1-Login as any Persona preferably Recruiter into the Corp HC Org.
2-Navigate to the Clinician Record and start the following flows : - Create HPF,
3-Start the Create HPF flow and fill all the details.
4- After filling all the details and navigate to existing hpf screen.
7-W/o adding any hpf submit the flow.





Issue 1 - In Create HPF Flow, if user do not select any HPF, then also it allows user to complete the flow, ideally it should ask the user to select atleast one HPF.

Expected Result - Atleast a validation message should be displayed and ask the user to at-least enter one HPF.
Actual Result - As of now without selecting any HPF as well, it allows user to complete the create hpf flow.

Observation Bug - In Create HPF Flow, if user do not select any HPF, then also it allows user to complete the flow, ideally it should ask the user to select atleast one HPF.

1|i0fl4v: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as SFO and navigate to a PO contract record.
2-Ensure it has Shift records.
3-Now from summary tab start the Specify Rates flow.
4-Select Type of Rate as Shift and fill all the details on all the screens.
5-On last step click next and navigate back to and fro.

Issue - Upon navigating back and forth on Rate Details screen on the Specify Rates flow, the Shifts records are getting deselected.
Expected Result - Upon navigating back and forth on Rate Details screen on the Specify Rates flow, the Shifts records shouldn't be deselected.
Actual Result - Upon navigating back and forth on Rate Details screen on the Specify Rates flow, the Shifts records are getting deselected.

Regression Bug - Upon navigating back and forth on Rate Details screen on the Specify Rates flow, the Shifts records are getting deselected.

 stuti.jain 0 stuti.jain QA Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 08/Oct/25 10:55 AM   7 image-20251007-190929.png 07/Oct/25 3:08 PM SCP Sprint 10 08/Oct/25 2:07 AM As, It was not specifically mentioned in the solution, what all fields needed to be cloned, and what has to be replaced with new field after asking the same multiple times. It was told to clone all the fields except few and this(Shift field on PCA) one wasn’t under exceptions. So, it was referring to the previous shift field instead of newly cloned one.
Due to time constraint for development, as solution was properly written on Friday, I also didn’t get time to think about it and do it from my side only. I just did what was asked as mentioned above. If this had been mentioned clearly on solution what all fields need to be cloned and what not for every object. I wouldn’t have cloned it.
Design: Design Flaws
1|i0fi2f: 29/Jan/26 9:04 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as SFO and navigate to the Service account record.
2-Ensure on Service account cloned contract exists which has Shift coverage true.
3-Now navigate to PCA shift record and verify on old/cloned PCA record, Shift record value is coming from parent contract.

Issue - Duplicates records are getting created because of Cloned Shift records PCA.


Expected Result

Duplicates records shouldn't be getting created because of Cloned Shift records PCA.


Actual Result

# Duplicates records are getting created because of Cloned Shift records PCA. Shift record on the cloned PCA is populated with the Shift record of parent contract instead of cloned shift record
# Cloned From field on the cloned shift record is not populated

Duplicates records are getting created because of Cloned Shift records PCA.

1|i0fhiv: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM h3. ✅ *Preconditions:*

# A Client Contract is executed with Rate Pay Code configured.
# A Clinician Contract (CPA) is created with PCA having the *same rate* as the client contract.
# PCA record is automatically created under CPA.

h3. 🔄 *Steps to Reproduce:*

# Execute a Client Contract with a configured Rate Pay Code.
# Create a new Clinician Contract (CPA) using the same rate.
# Let the system auto-create the first PCA under this contract.
# Observe the PCA record → *Related tab*.

h3. 🔍 *Expected Result:*

* The PCA record should automatically display the *Rate Pay Code* (via flow) on creation, assuming all preconditions are met.
* When batch run then flow was running and creating rate pay code under wrong pca

h3. ❌ *Actual Result:*

* The *first PCA record does not show the Rate Pay Code*.
* After cloning the contract and creating a *second PCA*, and running the *batch job*, *both PCA records* get Rate Pay Codes populated.
* This indicates the flow did not work as expected on initial PCA creation.

!image-20251007-151025.png|width=670,alt="image-20251007-151025.png"!



!image-20251007-151040.png|width=670,alt="image-20251007-151040.png"!

Regression bug _Rate Pay Code not populated on first PCA record via flow after Clinician Contract creation

 resitha.s 0 resitha.s 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Observation bug, converted to an enhancement story to ensure that Corporate Support User who have access to Clinician Contracts can NOT delete rates within the 'Facility Rates as Reference' component on clinician contract.

AC1:
Given I am a Recruiter or Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support Apps
When I am on a Clinician Contract
And I am on the Summary tab
And I click on facility/HPF
And the system displays the Practice Operations rates ([+PR1050558-4863+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4863]) for specific Facility Title
Then the system shall NOT be allowed the user to delete any rates; this component should be read only as reference to the user.



screenshot for reference

!image-20260108-175815.png|width=603,alt="image-20260108-175815.png"! 		13/Jan/26 9:47 AM   5 image-20260108-175815.png 07/Oct/25 6:57 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 12.1 (UAT) 09/Jan/26 5:16 PM 1|i0fgan: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Contracting Specialist - Scott Fitzgerald
# Open a clinician contract in ‘Draft’ status with a HPF (linked to a service account with a PO contract in Executed status)
# Verify if the user can see the rates of the corresponding facility title from the executed PO contract in the 'Facility Rates as Reference' component

*Expected Result:*

User should only be able to view the PO contract rates in the 'Facility Rates as Reference' component

*Actual Result:*

User is able to delete the PO contract rates using the delete icon in the 'Facility Rates as Reference' component

Observation - User able to delete the facility rate from the 'Facility Rates as Reference' component on clinician contract

None

** Display the following message: “A signed *SCP* contract is not needed for this clinician. Please select next to confirm that this clinician is ready to start onboarding.”
** Confirm or Update: Effective From for each selected HPF.
*** Effective From is pre-populated with: existing value or today’s date if blank

Reference the story for more details

1|i0ffpz: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to Reproduce;*

# Navigate to Clinician record.
# Create fresh clinician contract record.
# configure rates. (first time rates display correctly).
# Rerun the configure rates flow & update clinician rates.
## *Issue*: Duplicate record is being created.
## *Expectation*: Existing record should be updated with new rate.
# Mark contract as executed & create new clinician contract (From previously active contract)
# Navigate to summary tab & see rates are copied from previously active contract.
## *Issue*: Clinician rates & Facility rates showing same.
## *Observation*: facility rates are being referred as cloned contract rates.
# Rerun the configure rates flow, (Facility rates & existing clinician rates are being displayed.)
## After completing the flow, New records are being created for facility rates and New record is created clinician rates as well.
## *Issue*: Duplicates record being created.
## *Expection/Observation* : There should be one rates against facility title. ( for e,g. for same Facility, Assistant medical director should not have $15 per hour as well as $20per hour.) considering time type is same.

1|i0fc93: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Preconditions:*

* At least one related HPF record exists for the Clinician Contract.
* Field {{No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Work__c}} is populated on related HPF(s).

h3. *Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in as a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps.
# Navigate to a Clinician Contract record.
# Ensure that associated HPF/Provider Network Contract records exist and have values populated for {{No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Work__c}}.
# Look for the field {{Anticipated Clinical Hours}} on the Clinician Contract record detail view.

h3. ❌ *Expected Result:*

* A *read-only* field labeled {{Anticipated Clinical Hours}} should be *visible* on the Clinician Contract UI.
* It should display the *roll-up sum* of the field {{No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Work__c}} from all related HPF records.

h3. ❗ *Actual Result:*

* The field {{Anticipated Clinical Hours}} is *not visible* on the Clinician Contract record page.(its there in backend/)

!image-20251003-120323.png|width=670,alt="image-20251003-120323.png"!

Anticipated Clinical Hours field not visible on Clinician Contract record UI

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-3377, PR1050558-3378 Check when the first HPF status = Active, (first clinical shift date is populated) , the license should be updated from Customer community to customer community plus 0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician
When I am provisioned access to the HC portal
Then I am automatically granted the following license:

* If one or more Healthcare Practitioner Facility records where Status = Active: Customer Community Plus
* If above criteria not met: Customer Community Login

Given I am a Clinician
When one or more of my HPF records are updated so that Status = Active
AND I have a Customer Community Login for the HC portal
Then my license is automatically updated to Customer Community Plus 		13/Oct/25 12:31 PM   4 01/Oct/25 9:52 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 03/Oct/25 5:20 AM 1|i0f9nj: 02/Feb/26 11:05 AM As a Clinician, I need to access the health cloud portal, so that I can complete activities and view information throughout my time at SCP

 resitha.s 0 resitha.s 2 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 01/Oct/25 2:14 PM   2 30/Sep/25 2:37 PM SCP Sprint 10 01/Oct/25 8:06 AM During development of US-1750, the solution specified checking only {{Stipend}}, {{Shift}}, {{Variable}}, and {{Target}} record types for overrate. However, after the SEP 30 standup call with [~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] and [~accountid:61f8618e8d9e3c00688e380b] , it was clarified that *all types except* {{Bounce}} *with* {{Over_Rate__c = 1}} should be considered for overrate approval.

1|i0f8b3: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter - Myrtle Will
# Open a clinician contract record
# Configure the rates such that the Leadership Incentives is over the facility rate
# Click ‘Submit Contract Request’ button from Summary tab
# Open another clinician contract record
# Configure rates for other bonus type
# Click ‘Submit Contract Request’ button from Summary tab

*Expected Result:*

# First contract should be submitted to VPO for approval
# Second contract should be submitted to VPO and Tactical Team queue for approval

*Actual Result:*

# Contract is not submitted to VPO for approval when Leadership Incentives is over the facility rate
# Contract is submitted only to Tactical Team queue for approval when other bonus rate is added

Issues in clinician contract approval process

1|i0f82n: 30/Sep/25 12:58 PM As per AC when we complete the flow, it should clone previous active contract. (Executed)

*Issue 1:* Contract is cloned when there is contract with status other than Executed.



*Steps to reporduce:*

# Navigate to Service Account record.
# Run “Request Contract Change” flow.
## Select yes or No. *(doesn’t Matter)* : It clones record. *(irrespective of status)*

!image-20250930-155030.png|width=667,alt="image-20250930-155030.png"!

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D 1 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 06/Oct/25 5:40 AM   3 image-20250930-093132.png 30/Sep/25 5:33 AM SCP Sprint 10 03/Oct/25 4:41 AM this was not discussed in solution. After defect was raised, it was agreed to have this implementation
Design: Design Flaws
1|i0f73b: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM h4. Title

Anticipated Clinical Hours (Hour Commitment) entered during Clinician Contract Request is *not mapping* to {{*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_}} (HPF field) — field shows *0* after contract creation; history tracking not recorded.

h4. Preconditions

# UI for capturing *Anticipated Clinical Hours* (PR1050558-2791) is deployed and accessible.
# Data migration field {{*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_}} exists on HPF/Contract object.
# History tracking should be enabled for {{*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_}} but may not be turned on yet.
# Clinician is NP/PA, Employee, *non-full time* (only these should capture hour commitment).

h4. Steps to Reproduce (exact navigation)

# Login as *Recruiter* (or PayrollUser).
# App Launcher → *Corporate Support Apps* → *Clinician Contacts*.
# Open target *Clinician* record (Professional Title = NP/PA; Employment Type = Employee; Time Type = Part Time).
# Click *Start New Contact Request* (or *Initiate Contract Request*).
# Proceed through flow to *Select HPF*.
# On HPF/Contract Details screen, locate *Anticipated Clinical Hours / Hour Commitment* field.
# Enter a valid value: *120* (3-digit integer, no decimals). Save.
# Complete the Contract Request flow and *create/submit* the Contract (finish the flow so Contract record is created).
# Navigate to the created *Contract*

h4. Actual Result

* After contract creation the mapped field {{*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_}} displays *0* (zero) instead of the entered value ({{120}}).
* Field history shows *no entry* for the Anticipated Clinical Hours change (history tracking not recorded).

h4. Expected Result

* The value entered in the Clinician Contract Request flow for *Anticipated Clinical Hours* (e.g., {{120}}) must be *mapped* and *persisted* to the data-migration target field {{*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_}} on the HPF/CPA/Contract record after contract creation.
* Field history tracking must record the change (old value, new value, user, timestamp).

!image-20250930-093132.png|width=670,alt="image-20250930-093132.png"!

Anticipated Clinical Hours not populating after contract creation (maps to *_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_)

None

1|i0f72v: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter
# Open a clinician contract in ‘Draft’ status
# From ‘Summary’ tab, click ‘Configure Rates’ button
# Enter the value for ‘Anticipated Clinical Hours’ field, select Type Of Rate, enter the rates and click ‘Finish’ button
# Repeat for all HPFs on the contract

*Expected Result*

'Anticipated Clinical Hours' field on the clinician contract should be populated as the sum of Anticipated Clinical Hours captured per HPF

*Actual Result:*

'Anticipated Clinical Hours' field on the clinician contract is not updated

'Anticipated Clinical Hours' field on Contract not populated even after user entering the values

 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 01/Oct/25 4:16 AM   2 image-20250929-164129.png 29/Sep/25 12:42 PM SCP Sprint 10 30/Sep/25 8:16 AM the field was not present in DD after several reminder in original story. Later after bug was raised, it was asked to be added.
Requirements: Incomplete Requirements
1|i0f62f: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Preconditions:*

* Clinician record exists with Professional Title = NP/PA, Employment Type = Employee.
* HPFs with valid PCA per-hour rates (e.g., 80 and 90) exist for averaging.
* User logged in as PayrollUser with access to Clinician Contact request

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Login as PayrollUser.
# Navigate: App Launcher → Corporate Support Apps → Clinician Contacts.
# Open a valid NP/PA Employee clinician record.
# Start New Contact Request → Select HPFs.
# Navigate to Contract Details / Compensation Details section.
# Review calculated fields after saving the reques

*Expected Result:*

* The following fields should display in the UI per requirement:
** *EE NP/PA Hourly Blended* = Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs.
** *EE NP/PA Full Time Overage Rate* = Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs + $2.
** *EE NP/PA Full Time Weekly Blended* = Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs * 40.
** *EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended* = EE NP/PA Hourly Blended * NP/PA Tier.

*Actual Result:*

* *EE NP/PA Full Time Weekly Blended* field is *not present in UI*.

!image-20250929-164129.png|width=670,alt="image-20250929-164129.png"!

EE NP/PA Full Time Weekly Blended field missing in UI

None

1|i0f5ef: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM Steps to Reproduce:-

2-Start the Initiate Clinical Match flow and ensure to complete it.
3-Navigate to cases tab on Clinician Record and verify the case.

Issue - Data Quality and Clinician Exp Specialist Persona are not able to access Clinical Match cases.
Expected Result - Data Quality and Clinician Exp Specialist Persona should be able to access Clinical Match cases.
Actual Result - Data Quality and Clinician Exp Specialist Persona are not able to access Clinical Match cases.

QA  
29/Sep/25 6:30 AM   To Do Provider Offboarding Unresolved   Low   PR1050558-2474 Kristin Koide Open ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3318
No permission
 stuti.jain 0 stuti.jain QA Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     1 29/Sep/25 6:30 AM SCP Sprint 10 1|i0f5dr: 29/Sep/25 6:32 AM Steps to Reproduce:-
1-Login as MSL user and navigate to a Clinician Record.
2-Start the Initiate Clinical Match flow and ensure to select Initiate Termination Request checkbox.
3-Initiate Termination Request flow is displayed.
4-Complete the flow and select the checkbox for the Initiate Clinical Match and click on Next.
5-Again Initiate Clinical Match flow is started.

Issue 1 - A loop is going on if user keeps on selecting the checkboxes on both the flows Initiate Clinical Match and Initiate Termination Request flows.
Expected Result - A loop for the flows shouldn't happen.
Actual Result - As of now loop is going on for both the flows.

Issue 2 - If user navigates from Initiate Clinical Match to Initiate Termination Request flow then for nanoseconds dialog box of Initiate Clinical Match is being displayed with Finish button, Ideally it shouldn't happen.
Expected Result - For nanoseconds too dialog box of Initiate Clinical Match shouldn't be displayed with Finish button.
Actual Result - For nanoseconds dialog box of Initiate Clinical Match is being displayed with Finish button,

Issue 3 - Everytime user completes the Initiate Clinical Match then a new Clinical Match case is being created, Ideally if one Open cases is present then a new duplicate case shouldn't be created.
Expected Result - If one Open cases is present then a new duplicate case shouldn't be created.
Actual Result - As of now duplicates cases are being created everytime user completes the Initiate Clinical Match flow.

Observation Bug: A loop is going on for the Initiate Clinical Termination Request and Initiate Clinical Match flows.

None

No permission
 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 29/Sep/25 12:53 PM   2 image-20250926-163333.png 26/Sep/25 12:35 PM SCP Sprint 10 29/Sep/25 8:16 AM Invalid defect 1|i0f2zb: 29/Sep/25 12:53 PM h3. *Description*

When generating PCA rate plans, the *Bonus Rate* is not being calculated. Currently:

* {{EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c}} = *Average Hourly Rate* (working correctly).
* {{EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Overage_Rate__c}} = *Average Hourly Rate + 2* (working correctly).
* *Bonus Rate* = *Not calculated* (missing or blank).

All rates for PCA have *Unit of Measure = Per Hour*. The expected calculation for Average = *Sum / No. of PCA*

h3. *Preconditions*

* Rate Plan exists with 3 Rate Types: *Bonus, Variable, Target*.
* PCA records available with Hourly Rates.
* User has access to view Rate Plans and related fields.

h3. *Steps to Reproduce*

# Login as *payroll User*.
# Navigate to *Contracts → PCA Rate Plans*.
# Open a rate plan with Rate Types = Bonus, Variable, Target.
# Verify values of {{EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c}} and {{EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Overage_Rate__c}}.
# Check for Bonus Rate calculation.

h3. *Expected Result*

* *Hourly Blended Rate* = Avg Hourly Rate.
* *Full-Time Overage Rate* = Avg Hourly Rate + 2.
* *Bonus Rate* = Should calculate as per formula defined (e.g., Avg Hourly Rate + Bonus logic).
* All 3 rate plans (Bonus, Variable, Target) should calculate consistently for PCA.

actual result

*Bonus Rate is not calculated*



!image-20250926-163333.png|width=670,alt="image-20250926-163333.png"!

!image-20250926-163502.png|width=670,alt="image-20250926-163502.png"!

Bonus Rate not calculating for PCA Rate Plans (EE_NPPA Hourly Blended & Overage Rate)

None

 Samudhraa Samudhraa PR1050558-3261, PR1050558-3321, PR1050558-3387 As discussed over 1:1 , In the Configure rates omniscript - where we display rates -
As part of clone process - update the Facility rate as well, so that it is easier to get the PO contract. (Currently the first time a clinician contract is created, Facility rate field is populated on CPA. Then if the clinician contract is cloned, the Cloned From is populated, but Facility rate is not populated/cloned over. That should be cloned over as well)
Add Facility rate as a column on the rates table (as shown in screenshot)
- in case of rates from Practice operations contract, (where the rates have not been edited), the facility rate and rate column will have same value.

Indicate rates that are from PO contract (facility rate) and clinician contract.
Currently we get rates from both PO and clinician contract. we need to indicate on the UI. Add a column : Source ( Facility Rate , Existing Clinician Rate ) , second column 		0 Samudhraa Samudhraa 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given, I am a contracting specialist on the ‘Configure Rates’ process of a Draft Clinician contract,
When I select each Type of Rate

And I can choose to uncheck the additional Practice Operation rates that do not apply for the current draft Clinician contract. (if the contract is cloned then the Cloned Rates & new rates will checked by default, user can unselected them and/or update the rate as needed)

Mock: in the mock the ‘Facility Rate' column holds the rate from the Practice Operations contract & the ‘Rate’ is the from the Clinician’s contract.

No permission
 stuti.jain 0 stuti.jain 1 QA Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project 21/Nov/25 12:08 PM   3 25/Sep/25 9:13 AM SCP Sprint 10 11/Nov/25 4:43 AM Design: Design Flaws
Design: Design Flaws
1|i0f0qv: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM Steps to Reproduce:
1-Login as any Persona preferably Recruiter into the Corp HC Org.
2-Navigate to the Clinician Record and start the following flows : - Create HPF,
3-Start the Create HPF flow and click Save for later option and confirm ok.
4-Now click on the link which is shown, an error will be displayed.
5-Go back to create hpf flow and w/o filling the Taxonomy click next, again an error will be displayed.
6-Now enter taxonomy and fill all the details and navigate to existing hpf screen.
7-W/o adding any hpf submit the flow



Issue 2 - Upon clicking the Save for Later button and confirming it, an error message is being displayed.
Error -> +_Error_+

+_Looks like you dont have access to the {0} object and {1} field. Ask your Salesforce admin for help._+

+_Please contact your Salesforce Administrator._+

Expected Result - The error shouldn’t be displayed upon clicking the Save for Later button.
Actual Result - As of now Upon clicking the Save for Later button and confirming it, an error message is being displayed.


+Below Issue is fixed, please check comments+
*_Issue 1 - In create hpf flow, if user does not enter Taxonomy then upon navigating to next screen an error is being displayed._*

*_Expected Result - The error shouldn’t be displayed if user have not entered the taxonomy, as taxonomy is not a required field._*
*_Actual Result - If user does not enter Taxonomy then upon navigating to next screen an error is being displayed._*

+Below issues is Moved to new bug -+ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4190|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-4190|smart-link]

Issue 3 - In Create HPF Flow, if user do not select any HPF, then also it allows user to complete the flow, ideally it should ask the user to select atleast one HPF.

Expected Result - Atleast a validation message should be displayed and ask the user to at-least enter one HPF.
Actual Result - As of now without selecting any HPF as well, it allows user to complete the create hpf flow.

Regression Bug - Upon clicking the Save for Later button and confirming it, an error message is being displayed.

None

1|i0f0qn: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Steps to reproduce:*

# Login as Recruiter
# Open a Clinician Contract record in ‘Approved’ status and having multiple HPF records
# Click “Generate Term Sheet” button

*Expected Result:*

# Term Sheet document should be generated with all required details - Compensation for EE Full Time/Part Time contract should be in the format [EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended] per Month or [EE NP/PA Hourly Blended] per Hour
# Job details should be populated on the Term Sheet document for multiple HPFs
# -File name should be in the following format when there are multiple HPFs on the contract- {color:#403294}-<ClinicianFullName>-<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf-{color}

# Compensation for EE Full Time/Part Time contract does not have the measure populated
# Job details are not populated at all when there are multiple HPFs on the contract {color:#ff5630}- AC change{color}
# -File name of the generated term sheet of contract with multiple HPFs is coming as- {color:#403294}-<ClinicianFullName>null<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf-{color}{color:#ff5630} - Not an issue as this was based on the Suggestion mentioned in AC but was never finalized{color}

15/Oct/25 7:16 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Client 360 Accepted   High ClientMaintenance, ClinicianImpact, TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-1682, PR1050558-1739, PR1050558-2659, PR1050558-2916, PR1050558-3190, PR1050558-3389, PR1050558-3574 Srishty Sharma Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-3187
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3188, PR1050558-3189, PR1050558-3265 As part of the batch class built for 2916, in the start method, we would have gotten the PO CPA where Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c or Rate_Pay_Code_Added_c > 0.
Add method to Get Client RatePayCodes
Query for RatePaycode, where Is_Newly_Added > 0 or Is_Deleted = true.
Get the RatePayCode>PCA>Shift>Shift_Full_Name__c Code and RatePayCode.PayCodeName

Add method to match the Clinician Shift PCA
Match the PO RatePayCode using the Shift_Full_Name__c with the existing Clinician PCA > shift>Shift_Full_Name__c and PO.RatePayCode > PCA > FacilityTitle with Clinician PCA.FacilityTitle
For the matched Clinician PCA

to add RatePayCode
if PO RatePayCode has Is_Newly_Added true , create a new rate paycode for clinician PCA and insert
to delete RatePayCode
if PO RatePayCode has Is_Deleted to true, query for the ratePaycode by matching the RatePayCode.PayCodeName and delete the record from clinician PCA.

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Coverage Change - new shift with same shift type and same rate [See story [+PR1050558-2916+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916]]

AC2: Rate Pay Code Change - New pay code added to Shift (no Rate Changes)
Given I am an SFO within the Corporate Support Apps
When I clone a *Practice Operations contract* in Status = Executed
And I add new *Rate Pay Code(s)* to Shift(s)
And No rate changes have occurred
Then the cloned Practice Operations contract Status gets updated to Status = “Executed” & Start Date equals current date, the system shall automatically Add the Rate Pay Code to all related *Clinician* contracts meeting the following criteria:

* Clinician Contract Status ≠ Canceled
* HPF Service Account matches Practice Operations Contract’s Service Account

Note: Before the Practice Agreement Contract Status = Executed, the pay code must be established in Qgenda. (will be addressed as part of the business process within the existing approval process.)

AC3: Platform event trigger for HPFTrigger (HPFUpdates__e) for Qgenda [See story [+PR1050558-3190+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3190] ] 		15/Oct/25 7:16 PM   5 24/Sep/25 9:29 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 24/Sep/25 9:29 PM 1|i0e69g:zzyx 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a SFO, I want the system to automatically update all related Clinician executed Contracts based on specific type of updates made to the *Practice Operations* contract record, so that Clinician Contracts stay in sync with the Client contract and contract generation in Qgenda can be appropriately triggered.

* *-Coverage Change - Only Shift changes-*-: no new shift record created. New Shift is add with the same Type and same Rate.- [See story [+PR1050558-2916+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2916]]
* *Pay Code Change*: Only paycode change, new paycode added to shift (no rate change)

Facility Change Request: Coverage Change - Only Pay Code Change - Auto Update Executed Clinician Contracts

None

# Login as Recruiter
# Open a Clinician Contract record in ‘Approved’ status and having multiple HPF records

Locations value on the Term Sheet document is populated even with contract’s HPFs *Service Account* name when HPF status != Active

No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3103, PR1050558-3039, PR1050558-3262 Based on Contract Start Date entered in Previous Screen [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link]

Contract Start Date = user entered date from screen [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link]

{color:#bf2600}NOTE: As part of this story, the mapping of Radio (Coverage change - Yes or No) of 1739 should be to contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c (practice operations){color}

# For All Use Case First Step:
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status in Draft, Submitted, In Progress AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
### Error Message: There is a draft Practice Operation contract under this service account. The system cannot request a contract change at this time. Complete the pending draft Practice Operation contract or cancel the change to proceed further.
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status in Executed AND StartDate = Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
### Error Message: There is a contract for the Contract Start Date select either a different date for the change or first cancel the existing contract and try again.
## Check if there is contract to clone Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
### when not found message “No previous contract -not- found to perform a change to clone from”
# When *Are you requesting only Coverage Change?* = No
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND StartDate > Contract Start Date AND Shift_Coverage_Change__c = false AND Contract.Status = Executed AND AccountId = Account from where the button was clicked
### if found then display there error message
#### Display All the Contract forward Contract using the query output above
#### Error Message: {color:#ff991f}“There is an executed Practice Operation contract for Rate Change under this service account that lies within the time window. The system cannot request a contract change at this time.“{color}
### When *not* found
#### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1 (Clone the last Contract that executed that is before the requested start date (Contract Start Date) with and navigate to the cloned contract record) (e.g. Contract Start Date = 04/15/2025, C1: 01/01/2025, C2: 04/01/2025, C3: 06/01/2025 then you need to pick C2 to clone)
##### When User Clicks the Create Button
###### when found Clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
# When *Are you requesting only Coverage Change?* = Yes
## Check if there is forward contract in the System Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.StartDate > Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) AND Status = Executed
### When not found *(Insert new contract in future date)*
#### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
#### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
##### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### When User Clicks the Create Button and there is no error condition then clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
### When Found *(Insert in between use case)*
#### *Check Future Mixed Mag*
##### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate > Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
##### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
###### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### *Check current contract is Mixed Mag*
##### Display Contract that can be cloned using the Query: Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1
##### From the Contract selected in 3.a.i.1 check ContractPaymentAgreement.Type__c = Shift AND ContractPaymentAgreementContractId AND ContractPaymentAgreement.Mixed_Bag_Shift_Rates__c > 1
###### When record found error message {color:#bf2600}“Coverage Change cannot be done for this contract as there are mixed rate for same shift type go back and select no are you requesting coverage change”{color}
#### When User Clicks the Create Button and there is no error condition then clone the entire Contract records including Shift__c, ContractPaymentAgreement, PreventiveCareAgreement and Rate_Pay_Code__c
##### Contract.RecordType = Practice Operations AND Contract.Status = Executed AND Contract.StartDate < Contract Start Date AND AccountId = Account (from where the button was clicked) Order By Contract.StartDate DESC LIMIT 1 (Clone the last Contract that executed that is before the requested start date (Contract Start Date) with and navigate to the cloned contract record) (e.g. Contract Start Date = 04/15/2025, C1: 01/01/2025, C2: 04/01/2025, C3: 06/01/2025 then you need to pick C2 to clone)

*Either gray out the Create Button or throw error message when Create is clicked



**us below visual a reference only-follow the logic in AC and Solution**

!Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png|width=939,alt="Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project NOTE: guide process starts with story [1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739], next is this rules story, than after this story is [2906|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2906].

AC1: Clone from current active contract - *no* contract with *future start date*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is ONLY one Executed Practice Operations Contract; NO Executed contracts with a future start date (Executed ‘Contract Start Date’ is greater than requested Contract’s start date)
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the Executed contract and new contract Status is set to “Draft”,

AC2: Clone from current active contract - Allow Draft in between 2 contracts ONLY if *Future contract type is Coverage Change*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract with future start date and Reason for Change = Shift Coverage Change ONLY
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the current Executed contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) and new contract Status is set to “Draft” - clone all fields except EndDate

*NEW* AC2: Clone from current active contract - Allow Draft in between 2 contracts ONLY if *Future contract type is NOT Coverage Change & New change is Coverage Change*
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract with future start date and Reason for Change = Shift Coverage Change ONLY
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields, and click Next
Then the system shall clone the current Executed contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) and new contract Status is set to “Draft”

AC3: Don’t clone - Only *one Draft* Contract
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And there is a Practice Operations contract in Status = Draft, Submitted, In Progress
And I select “Request Contract Change”, input required fields and click Next
Then display error message: There is a draft Practice Operation contract under this service account. The system cannot request a contract change at this time. Complete the pending draft Practice Operation contract or cancel the change to proceed further.

AC4: Check for *different rates within Shift Types* (across facility titles & Shift Type)
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And I select “Request Contract Change”, and *selected Shift Coverage Change only* and click Next
Then before cloning the system shall check if the current Executed Contract (requested contracts ‘Contract Start Date’ is within the executed contract’s start date) if it has shift types that contains different rates per Facility Title and Shift Type combination

* If there are different rates within a single Shift Type & Facility Title combination, then do NOT allow the user to proceed
** Display error message: Unable to proceed with the selected type of change. Current executed contract contains different rates per Shift Type & Facility Title combination.
* If there are same rates within a single Shift Type & Facility Title combination, then allow user to proceed.

Example of Same Shift Type and Same Facility Title *w/ same rates*

[Facility Title] - [Shift Type] [Iteration] - [Rate]
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 1 - $100
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 2 - $100

EE Physician - Day 1 - $200
EE Physician - Day 2 - $200

Example of Same Shift Type and Same Facility Title *w/ different rates*

[Facility Title] - [Shift Type] [Iteration] - [Rate]
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 1 - $100
Ambassador NP/PA - Day 2 - $110

EE Physician - Day 1 - $200
EE Physician - Day 2 - $210

AC5: Remove “Clone” button from the Practice Operations contract
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Practice Operations contract
Then the “Clone” button shall be removed.

AC6: No overlapping Contract Start Dates
Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Service Account record
And I select “Request Contract Change”
And the ‘Contract Start Date’ inputted matches the start date of an executed contract
Then the system shall display an error message if the inputted ‘Contract Start Date’ matches the start date of an executed contract (Design: display error on second step)

* Error Message: There is a contract for the same ‘Contract Start Date’, either select a different date for the change or first cancel the existing contract and try again.

{color:#bf2600}NOTE: Solution covers more in depth implementation details not in AC so check the Solution for exact details.{color} 		13/Oct/25 12:32 PM   5 Use Case_ Request Contract Change - Practice Operations v3.png 23/Sep/25 8:02 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 26/Sep/25 4:52 AM 1|i0e69g:zt 02/Mar/26 8:45 PM As a SFO, I want the system to guide me through the Practice Operations contract change request process, so that a new contract is appropriate cloned from the correct executed contract and additional rules are in place to ensure that the new contract is created correctly. 01/Oct/25

Facility Change Request: Practice Operation Contract - Rules

None

-AC2 : When creating new user, the following license has to be assigned- Split to story [+PR1050558-3230+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3230]
-New Clinicians - Custom Community Login-
-Existing Clinicians - Customer Community Plus-
-Internal - Customer Community Plus Login-

-Existing Clinician ( HPF already exists and Email) and applying for new job (applicant as well)-
-New Clinician ( No HPF and SCP email)-
-In user creation, Profile has to be changed according to the license-

AC 3: Community At a Glance
Use the correct profile (changed profile) to get the Account Details

AC 4: Do not use Health Cloud Platform license for External users, instead use/clone Assessment Envelope for community users and ensure it works similar to the Assessment Extension

1|i0euuv: 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM *Issue 1: Able to edit the fields in HPF record*
Expected Result: Fields should be read only and can't be edit.
Fields - Practitioner, Account, Status, Facility Title, Last Date Worked
Actual Result: Able to edit the Practitioner, Account, Status, Facility Title, Last Date Worked fields.
!image-2025-09-22-23-49-59-223.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 2:Failed to add HPF Number (auto number)*
Expected Result: HPF Number (auto number) should be added in the page layout.
Actual Result: HPF Number (auto number) is missed in the layout.
!image-2025-09-22-23-20-18-933.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 3: None of the fields are tracking enabled on the object.*
Expected Result: Fileds should be tracking enabled.
Actual Result: None of the fields are tracking enabled.

*Issue 4: Inactive Reasion field is not created on HPF record object.*
Expected Result: Should be crete Inactive Reasion field on the HPF object.
Actual Result: Shouldn't shoeing Inactive Reasion field on HPF record.

*Issue 5: For Certain record types the field Global Facility Id is not present.*
Expected Result: Should show Global Facility Id field in HPF record.
Actual Result: Global Facility Id field should be available for all the record types.

*Issue 6: Requested By & Requested Date fields are not present in Contract (Clinician) record*
Expected Result: Should show Requested By & Requested Date fields in Contract (Clinician) record.
Actual Result: Shouldn't showing Requested By & Requested Date fields in Contract (Clinician) record.
!image-2025-09-22-23-57-05-289.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 7: The fields mentioning in the user story fields are missing in Contract (Client - Practice Operations).*
Expected Result: Should show Contract (Client - Practice Operations) fields on the layout.

(NP/PA) Coverage Type

(NP/PA) Hours per Day

(NP/PA) Hours Per Year

(PHY) Blended Hourly

(NP/PA) Blended Incentive Hourly

(PHY) Compensation Type

(PHY) Coverage Type

(PHY) Hours Per Day

(PHY) Hours Per Year

Actual Result: Not showing above mentioned fields in Contract (Client - Practice Operations) record.
!image-2025-09-23-00-00-24-253.png|thumbnail!

*Issue 8: Not able to create a Locums Company record.*
Expected Result: Should be create Locums Company record type.
Actual Result: Not able to crete Locums Company record type.

Issues on Add Additional Fields

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3045, PR1050558-3109, PR1050558-3246 * Field creation part of 2924
Ensure the field SCP to Book travel is already created on Contract. If not create it as per [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2924|smart-link]

In the Contract Request omniscript, add SCP to book travel as part of the second screen , below the date fields ( both the Contract selection screens in OS). This UI input will be mapped to the Contract.SCP to book travel field at backend

As part of Clone process ( Clinician_CloneContract IP), ensure this field is cloned over in the new contract.

 0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I create a clinician contract
Then I am able to indicate SCP to Book Travel (checkbox, default unchecked) on the Contract record

When I create a clinician contract *from clone*
Then I am able to see that the value in the SCP to Book Travel field has copied over from the original contract to the cloned contract



Notes:

* Clinician Contract level or per HPF? Contract level (able to book travel, if it was per site then it would be a special terms)
* What is needed? Is a check box fine? Check box is ok (default, uncheck) (Recruiter & Clinician Experience Specialist)
** Can Edit field on the Contract record, when in Status in Draft
* Does it apply to a specific Employment Type? All
* When would you capture? Contract creation

 Pratik Kedar 0 Pratik Kedar Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     1 image-20250918-180357.png 18/Sep/25 12:45 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 Incomplete requirement, bug logged as part of QA team’s testing.

1|i0eqcv: 30/Sep/25 2:42 AM h1. Observations:



*Scenario 1 :* Shift end time is earlier than start time. --No validation.

*Impact :* Shift duration is showing in Negative (-2 Hours) & User can still proceed with guided form & case will get generated.



*Scenario 2:* Start & end Time is same. → Shift Duration calculate to = 0.

*Impact :* User can proceed with the form. & case is record is getting created.



*Scenario 3:* Without selecting the Shift record. User can proceed on next screen. Covered in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|smart-link]

*Impact :* User can proceed with next screen without selecting shift record.& Case will be created.



*Scenario 4:* If you select start time & end time with 1.5 hours gap. Shift duration is rounding off to 2 hours. *Covered in* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2964?atlOrigin=eyJpIjoiMjU0ZmY2YTgzNjE5NDQ1MzlmYWJiODAxYjc0YmQ5M2EiLCJwIjoiamlyYS1zbGFjay1pbnQifQ|smart-link]

!image-20250918-180357.png|width=890%,alt="image-20250918-180357.png"!



*Scenario 5 : Shift date & time fields are only for calculatiing the Shift duration. Not the shift. It is filtered based on Date.*

[Observation Bug]: Open Shift Apay request Form.

-Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps-
-When I navigate to a- *-clinician contract-* -record where Status =- *-Draft-*
-And I am on the Summary Tab-
-Then I have the ability to capture “*Anticipated Clinical Hours*” for each HPF-

-And if Anticipated Clinical Hours are captured, then user should have visibility to see the amount of hours captured-

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3048, PR1050558-3112, PR1050558-3245 [^Clinician-LDD-Integration - Contract Date and Status Update.pdf]

(CompanySignedDate < StartDate)

Scheduled Flow on Clinician Contract, where Executed and StartDate = TODAY, (new contract)
and If there is an existing contract (Old contract) of the same employment Type and Status = executed, EndDate is > TODAY or null and startdate < = today,
Then make the following update on existing executed contract
OldContract.EndDate = NewContract.StartDate - 1,
OldContract.Status - Cancelled
OldContract.CancellationReason = Superseded.
 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When a clinician has a Clinician Contract that is *active*:

* ‘Start Date' less than or equal to today’s date
* ‘Status’ equals “Executed”
* ‘End Date’ is blank/No End Date OR End Date is greater (future) or equal to today’s date

And Clinician has a *new* Executed Contract:

* ‘Status’ equals “Executed”
* ‘Employment Type’ is the same other both active/old contract and new executed contract

Then on ‘Start Date’ of the Newly Executed Contract, the system will automatically update the active/old contract’s:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ equals “Cancelled”
* ‘Cancelled Reason’ equals “Superseded”

And if the Newly Executed contract’s ‘Start Date’ is today or in the past, then the system shall *immediately* update the active/old contract:

* ‘End Date’ = [New Executed Contract’s Start Date minus 1 day]
* ‘Status’ equals “Cancelled”
* ‘Cancelled Reason’ equals “Superseded”



NOTE: ‘End Date’ will not get updated to if the End Date is before the start date, End Date must be AFTER the Start date.

|*Old Contract Employment_Type__c*|*New Contract Employment_Type__c*|*Contract.End Date*|*Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)*|
|Employee|Employee|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|IC|IC|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Locum|Locum|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Leased|Leased|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Partner|Partner|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded|
|Managed|Managed|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 , then update previous Contract*
Status = Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Superseded| 		15/Oct/25 5:43 PM   3 17/Sep/25 6:23 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 24/Sep/25 8:31 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzx8y 29/Jan/26 9:05 PM As a Recruiter, I need contract dates to be updated automatically, so dates follow specified business rules 24/Sep/25

Clinician Contract Date Alignment - No Employment Type Change

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3050, PR1050558-3114, PR1050558-3264 Create a batch job that is Scheduled to run daily
on CPA of (Practice Operations Contract ) where StartDate = Today & Status = Executed , Contract.RecordType = Client, and Type= ShiftType and
Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = true and Is_Newly_Added__c = true and rateIncreased = false and rateDecreased = false ( to get the newly added shift of same type and no rate change)
OR Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c!= null or Rate_Pay_Code_Removed__c != null ( to get only if rate pay codes are added or removed - part of story 3187)

Get the Client PCAs of this CPA (as the rates from this should be added to the clinician contract)

*Get Clinician Contracts*
Query for CPAs where Contract.RecordType = Clinician and Clinician Contract with Status != Cancelled, (as we are applying changes from PO contract to all contracts) and PNC>HPF>Account = POContract > ServiceAccount

Copy rates for Same shift type
For each of the clinician CPA, get the PCAs and check if they match with the PO.PCA’s ShiftType (PCA > Shift > Shift_Full_Name__c) (eg., Day, Night) and check if the facilityTitle matches between Clinician PCA and PO PCA
Check if the PO.PCA.Rate > Clinician PCA.Rate, if so update the rate.
For the matched Clinician pCA, update the FacilityRate lookup to the new Po Contract.
Insert the PCAs

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Coverage Change - new shift with same shift type and same rate
Given I am an SFO within the Corporate Support Apps
When I clone a *Practice Operations contract* in Status = Executed
And I add a new shift with the *same Shift Type*{color:#403294}***{color} with the *same Rate*
And user can only select from *existing rates for that Shift Type*.
And I add a *Rate Pay Code* for that new shift
Then the cloned Practice Operations contract Status gets updated to Status = “Executed” & Start Date equals current date, the system shall automatically Add the Shift & Rate Pay Code to all related *Clinician* contracts meeting the following criteria:

* Clinician Contract Status ≠ Canceled
* HPF Service Account matches Practice Operations Contract’s Service Account

And if the Clinician rate (same Shift Type - Code Set is higher (overrate), then update the rate to match the Clinician’s rate

(example of adding Same Shift Type & Rate:

I have *Existing*: Shift Type = Day, Iteration = 1, Unit of Measure = per hour, Rate = $100
I *Add*: Shift Type = Day, Iteration = *2*, Unit of Measure = per hour, Rate = $100)

(example of Different Rates for same shift type, user to select based on current rate values)
Day 1 = 100
Day 2 = 110

Day 3 = User to select from: ‘100’ or ‘110’



{color:#403294}*Shift Type = Shift’s “Shift Name” (Shift Name is the Code Set record where Code Set Type = Shift){color}





AC2: Rate Pay Code Change - New pay code added to Shift (no Rate Changes) [See story [+PR1050558-3187+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187]+]+

AC3: Platform event trigger for HPFTrigger (HPFUpdates__e) for Qgenda [See story [+PR1050558-3190+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3190] ]

Only apples for [https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B823B3E53-1FF1-4094-B491-CA4D75B11141%7D&file=Account%20Change%20Management.xlsx&nav=MTBfe0Y0OTcyMTI1LTc5RkYtNDgyOC05RUE5LTZGOTlGRjBFMDEyMn1fezAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDEtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMH0&action=default&mobileredirect=true|https://schumachergroup.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/teams/UnifiedPlatform-ReGenesis/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B823B3E53-1FF1-4094-B491-CA4D75B11141%7D&file=Account%20Change%20Management.xlsx&nav=MTBfe0Y0OTcyMTI1LTc5RkYtNDgyOC05RUE5LTZGOTlGRjBFMDEyMn1fezAwMDAwMDAwLTAwMDEtMDAwMC0wMDAwLTAwMDAwMDAwMDAwMH0&action=default&mobileredirect=true|smart-link]

!image-20250926-164923.png|width=939,height=183,alt="image-20250926-164923.png"! 		15/Oct/25 7:16 PM   6 image-20250926-164923.png 17/Sep/25 9:17 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 24/Sep/25 8:20 AM 1|i0e69g:zzyi 11/Feb/26 1:53 PM As a SFO, I want the system to automatically update all related Clinician executed Contracts based on specific type of updates made to the *Practice Operations* contract record, so that Clinician Contracts stay in sync with the Client contract and contract generation in Qgenda can be appropriately triggered.

* *Coverage Change - Only Shift changes*: no new shift record created. New Shift is add with the same Type and same Rate.
* *-Pay Code Change-*-: Only paycode change, new paycode added to shift (no rate change)- [See story [+PR1050558-3187+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3187]+]+ 		30/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3051, PR1050558-3115, PR1050558-3263 All Changes to Apply to Practice Operation Contract

Create a validation rule in Shift__c to make sure only same shift type can be added when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true

* Validation Rule:
** Validation Rule to prevent the user from editing any shift Shift_Name__c when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true
** Error Message: “For Coverage Changes Shift Type changes not allowed”

Create a record triggered before save flow that will throw error when a new Shift__c records is created with a Shift Type that is not already available when Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true and is_cloned = null

* For a new record when Shift_Name__c entered check with Query: Select Shift_Name__c from Shift__c where Shift_Name__c = <Newly entered Shift>
** if the query returns the record then allow save
** if no result is returned error Error Message: “For Coverage Changes new Shift Type changes not allowed”



Preview Updated to UI

When Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true

Update the Flex Card ContractSpecifyRates

# Type of Rates: Filter and display only Shift
# In the next screen display only the new Shifts that was added previously identified by Shift__c.Cloned_From__c == ““
# When saving the *Preventive Care Agreement* record check if the rate entered matched with already exiting rate for the same shift type and facility title
## Query: Select Max(Rate__c), Min(Rate__c) from *PreventiveCareAgreement* WHERE FacilityTitle__c in (Facility Title Selected) AND Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code__c in (shift selected) group by FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__r.Code__c
### When Max(Rate__c) != Min(Rate__c) then throw error “The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match”
### When Max(Rate__c) != newly entered rate in UI throw error “The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match”
### When Max(Rate__c) = newly entered rate in UI then allow save

!image-20250929-131825.png|width=939,alt="image-20250929-131825.png"!

!image-20250930-130232.png|width=939,alt="image-20250930-130232.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project – First AC on story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1739|smart-link] –

-Given I am a SFO-
-When I am on a Service Account record-
-Then I enter the Change Request guided experience-
-Then I must select which changes are applicable:-

* -Shift or Variable Rate Increase-
* -Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-
* -Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-
* -Coverage Change (note for new user story - if coverage change, create a task for Payroll queue to review before client contract is requested)-
* -Coverage Change with New Shift Type-
* -NP/PA Tier Change-

-And I am able to select one or more changes to proceed with-

-Then I must specify a Start Date (date, required) and Description (text, 1000, required) for these changes-

-Then the system clones the Service Account’s Practice Operations Contract in Status = “Executed” with the newly created contract in Status = Draft-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift or Variable Rate Increase-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing record with a higher number in the rate field or-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift rate records or create new Shift rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records or create new Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift records, create new Shift records with the same type, and add rates for newly created shifts that match the same shift type-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change with New Shift Type-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to create new shifts where there is not already an existing shift of that type and I can add rates for the newly created shifts (also includes changes in Coverage Change detailed above)-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-NP/PA Tier Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit the NP/PA Tier field-

{color:#403294}REVISED based on Solution/Design{color}

{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When I select {color}{color:#403294}*Shift Coverage Change ONLY*{color}
{color:#403294}Once the Practice Operations Contract has been cloned{color}
{color:#403294}Then I am only able to create new Shift records with the {color}{color:#403294}*same shift type*{color}{color:#403294}, and {color}{color:#403294}*add rates (no rate changes*{color}{color:#403294}) for newly created shifts that match the same shift type{color}
An{color:#403294}d I am able to add/remove Rate Pay Codes to my newly added Shift records{color}
{color:#403294}And on Summary tab, when I select Specify Rates, then:{color}

* {color:#403294}'{color}{color:#403294}*Type of Rate*{color}{color:#403294}' field I can only select “Shift”{color}
** {color:#403294}I should NOT have the ability to add or edit any other type of rate (Variable, Leadership Incentive, Stipend, Target){color}
* {color:#403294}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#403294}*Type*{color}{color:#403294}' I should ONLY see the Shift Full Name(s) of the newly add Shifts (same Shift Type){color}
* {color:#bf2600}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#bf2600}*Type*{color}{color:#bf2600}' I should ONLY able to add new Shift for existing Facility Title already available with the same Shift Type {color}
* {color:#403294}On Rate Details screen, for ‘{color}{color:#403294}*Rate*{color}{color:#403294}’ the ONLY value that can be inputted is same rate.{color}
** {color:#403294}Error message: The ‘Rate' must match the previous rate entered for the selected Facility Title(s) & Shift Type(s). {color}{color:#6554c0}Select the Facility Title in such a way the rates will match.{color}

{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps{color}
{color:#403294}When I select {color}{color:#403294}*All Other Types of Changes*{color}
{color:#403294}Once the Practice Operations Contract has been cloned{color}
{color:#403294}Then I am to make edits as needed, no restrictions to current functionality.{color}
{color:#403294}And the system shall track the following updates made. (story sets flags 2659){color} 		15/Oct/25 7:16 PM   3 image-20250929-131825.png 16/Sep/25 10:18 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 16/Sep/25 10:18 AM 1|i0e69g:zv 02/Feb/26 4:30 PM As a SFO, I want the ability to make Facility (Service Account) Contract changes to Rates and Coverages, so that changes can flow to downstream process such as Clinician contracting,Conga, Docusign, Qgenda, & Workday.

Facility Change Request: Rates & Coverage 2 of 2

None

15/Sep/25 4:52 AM   To Do Unresolved   Low   soomjeet.sahoo Open ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2876
No permission
 Karthika D 0 Karthika D Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Bug SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project     2 image (59).png 15/Sep/25 4:52 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 15/Sep/25 11:51 AM Not covered explicitly in requirement.
Requirements: Ambiguous Requirements
1|i0egyr: 30/Sep/25 2:41 AM *Description:* The "For additional information about the Company’s data privacy practices, please review our Privacy Policy" URL in the CCPA notice on the Core Connect portal appears as a disabled or unlinked element with a grey color. This is inconsistent with the attached Intake Form document, where the same URL is a standard clickable link with a blue color. This UI inconsistency may lead users to believe the link is not functional or active.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to the Core Connect portal as a Clinician.
# Navigate to the Intake Form case.
# Locate the CCPA Notice section.
# Observe the color of the privacy policy URL.

*Expected Result:* The URL should be blue, consistent with the attached Intake Form document, and should be an active, clickable link.

*Description:* The "For additional information about the Company’s data privacy practices, please review our Privacy Policy" URL in the CCPA notice on the Core Connect portal appears as a disabled or unlinked element with a grey color. This is inconsistent with the attached Intake Form document, where the same URL is a standard clickable link with a blue color. This UI inconsistency may lead users to believe the link is not functional or active.

*Steps to Reproduce:*

# Log in to the Core Connect portal as a Clinician.
# Navigate to the Intake Form case.
# Locate the CCPA Notice section.
# Observe the color of the privacy policy URL.

*Expected Result:* The URL should be blue, consistent with the attached Intake Form document

!image (59).png|width=670%,alt="image (59).png"!

The URL for the CCPA Privacy Policy on the Core Connect portal displays a grey hue, but the URL on the provided Intake Form attachment is blue.

None

 0 Sakthi Kuppusamy 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an Integration User
When I update First Clinical Shift on a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record

When Healthcare Practitioner Facility, Facility Title is one of below

Employee
Independent Contractor
-Locum-

Managed
Partner

Then the following updates happen automatically:

* Status = Active
* Trigger the following platform event:
** Platform Event Fields, Name = HPFUpdates
*** HPF Id
*** Contract Id = [Contract.I|http://Contract.ID]d WHERE Contract.Employment_Type__c = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title_r.Code_Set_Sub_Type_c and HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId = Contract.AccountId and Status = Executed *Order By Start Date ASEC*
*** Global Provider Id
*** Global Facility Id
*** Type = “Rate for HPF”

All contract records the qualified the below condition need to have one Platform Event per contract records

* [Contract.I|http://Contract.ID]d WHERE Contract.Employment_Type__c = HealthcarePractitionerFacility.Facility_Title_r.Code_Set_Sub_Type_c and HealthcarePractitionerFacility.PractitionerId = Contract.AccountId and Status = Executed *Order By Start Date ASEC* 		07/Oct/25 3:58 PM   5 image-20250912-155845.png 12/Sep/25 11:34 AM SCP Sprint 10 12/Sep/25 2:18 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzx8zi 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an Integration User, I need to know when Healthcare Practitioner Facility are updated to Active status in Salesforce, so that I can update downstream systems

07/Oct/25 5:37 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   High TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-194, PR1050558-210, PR1050558-1103, PR1050558-1108, PR1050558-1109, PR1050558-1110, PR1050558-2210 nawal.bedmutha Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2822
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2823, PR1050558-2824, PR1050558-2837 This functionality may already exist. Please test before developing.

As part of the existing Clone functionality of a clinician contract,
If executed Clinician contract exists and we submit a new contract request,
check if the SA of the HPF is same as the existing contract’s ( cloned) HPF
Check if the Facility title is different
If both conditions are true,
Copy the rate from the existing contract’s HPF> CPA> PCA rate based on matching facility title

As part of Configure rates, match the HPF based on same SA. Match the CPA based on Type__c and use the appropriate field as key match.,
If Type__c = Shift, PCA.Shift__r.Shift_Full_Name__c
If Type__c != Shift, PCA > Type


Notes
we display the rate from the cloned clinician contract based on matching the Type (Type of Rate ≠Shift) or Shift Full Name (Type of Rate = Shift).

Add to configure rates button to copy rate$ to HPF with same service account(HPF) 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1 & 2 covered under [+PR1050558-2210+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2210]

-AC1: Update Contract Payment Agreement naming convention when cloning-
-Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps-
-When I navigate to a- *-Clinician-* -record-
-And I click on the- *-Contract Request-* -button-
-And select the option to- *-Start From Previous Active Contract-*
-Then they system should clone the Contract Payment Agreement record(s)-
-And Name = Contractnumber-Global_Account_Id*-HealthcarePractitionerFacility_HPF_Number-*--ratetype-

-AC2: Update Contract Payment Agreement (CPA) naming convention when add new CPA-
-Given that I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps-
-When I navigate to a- *-Clinician-* *-Contract-* -record in Status = Draft-
-And I select the Summary tab-
-And I click on the- *-Configure Rates-* -button-
-Then upon clicking Finish, the system shall create new Contract Payment Agreement record(s)-
-And Name = Contractnumber-Global_Account_Id*-HealthcarePractitionerFacility_HPF_Number-*--ratetype-

----

AC3: Copy clinician rates from old contract to new HPF (same service account)
Given that I am a Recruiter & Clinician Experience Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a *Clinician* *Contract* record in Status = Draft that was “Start From Previous Active Contract” (clone option - see story 1070 for rules)
And I select the Summary tab
And click “*Add HPF*” and add an HPF for the same Facility (service account) as the Cloned HPF, but *Facility Title is different*
And I clicked “Configure Rates” for the newly added HPF (green highlighted)
Then the system should *display the* +*higher*+ *rates from the cloned clinician contract or Client/Facility rate* based on *Type* (Type of Rate ≠ Shift) OR *Shift Full Name* (Type of Rate = Shift).
And *user can edit the Rate* as long of the Override Prohibited is NOT checked.

NOTE: Type of Rate = Bonus is NOT copied over per story <2593>

Example:

# *Client* Contract 1 for Service Account A
## EE Lead Midlevel Provider - Day 1 rate = $100
## EE Nurse Practitioner - Day 1 rate = $100
# *Clinician* *Contract 1* (created off of client contract 1)
## Service Account A, EE Lead Midlevel Provider - Day 1 rate = $150
# *Clinician* *Contract 2* Facility Title change from “EE Lead Midlevel Provider” to “EE Nurse Practitioner” (clone of Clinician Contract 1)
## Service Account A, EE Lead Midlevel Provider - *Day 1* rate = *$150* *(Cloned Rate from HPF)*
## User Clicks *“Add HPF”* to add new prospect HPF for same Service Account A, but change in Facility Title = EE Nurse Practitioner.
### On the Summary tab: Cloned HPF is Gray and newly “Add HPF” is Green
## User clicks on the green HPF and clicks Configure Rates
### On rate details step,
#### *Current/old* *process* - we would display the rate from the Client Contract:
##### Service Account A, EE Nurse Practitioner - Day 1 rate = $100 (clone from client)
#### *New* *process* - we display the rate from the cloned clinician contract based on matching the Type (Type of Rate ≠Shift) or Shift Full Name (Type of Rate = Shift).
##### Service Account A, EE Nurse Practitioner - *Day 1* rate = *$150* 		07/Oct/25 5:37 PM   3 12/Sep/25 9:45 AM SCP Sprint 10 12/Sep/25 9:45 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzhr 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, when I clone Clinician Contract rates, and I “Add HPF” for the same service account (eg. Facility Title change), then I want the system to copy rates from the current/cloned contract to the new HPF, so that I ensure I am offering the same rate as the current contract.

Also, I want to update the naming convention for Contract Payment Agreement records, so that we avoid duplicates when adding an HPF with the same Service Account as a cloned HPF. 		18/Sep/25

Clinician Contract Request: Copy rates from Old HPF to New

None
