13/Oct/25 11:34 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Platform Readiness Accepted   High TADesignComplete Bobbie Jo Folse   PR1050558-2814, PR1050558-2897 abhi.kondreddy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2815
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3053, PR1050558-3117, PR1050558-3254 # [See Onboarding Scenarios |https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-OKSaLgsop5bWkGbMPjIVo2Ru6du-HTr/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true] The Salesforce team will review and provide an update on status of these items.
## Current Clinician has a FCS (first clinical shift) that has pushed into downstream systems and that date change - Covered under story [+PR1050558-2623+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2623]
## Conversion of clinician from EE to IC - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]
## Conversion of clinician from IC to EE - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]
## Conversion of clinician from EE or IC to a Leased clinician - covered under this story [+PR1050558-2815+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2815]

Flow on contract record, status updated to Executed , Query for existing Clinician Contracts for the same Clinician, where status = Executed, and check if any of the following conditions are true (OR condition)


* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* → New Contract Employment Type = *Employee*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* or *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Leased*

then, Send email action


* Recipient: [HR@SCPhealth.com|mailto:HR@SCPhealth.com]
* Email Subject: Employment Type Change for <Clinician>
* Email Body:
[Clinician Name] ([Global Provider ID]) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Use Clinician.Global_Provider_ID__c



Set Recipient Email Address: Setup -> email alerts -> Send Employment Change Notification -> edit and under *Additional Emails give the HR email or any email that can be used for testing* 		0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a HR team member within the Corporate Support App
When a Clinician already has an executed contract and a *NEW contract gets “Executed”* for the clinician with a different employment type
Then in the following scenarios an email notification will be automatically sent:

* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* → New Contract Employment Type = *Employee*
* Old Clinician Contract Employment Type = *Independent Contractor* or *Employee* → New Contract Employment Type = *Leased*

And the email shall include:

* Recipient: [HR@SCPhealth.com|mailto:HR@SCPhealth.com]
* Email Subject: Employment Type Change for <Clinician>
* Email Body:
[Clinician Name] ([Global Provider ID]) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.
Thank you for your attention to this matter.



Example:

Jane Doe (1234567890) is changing Employment Type. Kindly coordinate with the relevant stakeholders and initiate the necessary preparations for processing.

Thank you for your attention to this matter. 		13/Oct/25 11:34 AM   6 11/Sep/25 9:24 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 15/Sep/25 12:59 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzex 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a HR team member, I want an email notification to be sent when a Clinician changes Employment Types, so that key teams can manually coordinate downstream updates. 29/Sep/25

Notification for Employment Type Changes

None
30/Sep/25
15/Oct/25 2:31 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Critical TADesignComplete Nate Hilburger   PR1050558-2907, PR1050558-3201, PR1050558-3990, PR1050558-5318, PR1050558-5634, PR1050558-2832, PR1050558-3171, PR1050558-3196, PR1050558-3769, PR1050558-3783, PR1050558-4409, PR1050558-5183, PR1050558-4003, PR1050558-4476, PR1050558-2791 Inderjit Singh Waraich Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2811
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3002, PR1050558-3003 * Link to template [https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|https://docs.google.com/document/d/1gM9YFc0Fu9zy1aaFFZDoWHgCtqD3INIO/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=107332607889089087961&rtpof=true&sd=true|smart-link]
* Field = Term Sheet Executed, creation part of [+PR1050558-1794+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1794]

Doc Gen, Use the sample document provided to generate template.

DR and Transform
From Clinician Contract, extract PNC from which you will get the HPF and ServiceAccounts.
Query the CPA of the Contract and group them by the HPF.
To get the Job details, HPF > Job_Applicant__c > Job > Job Title


|Contract.Employment_Type__c|Contract.Time_Type__C|Shift Type|Compensation| |
|Employee (EE)|Full Time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Monthly_Blended__c| |
|Employee (EE)|Part time|NP/PA (HPF> FacilityTitle > CodeSetType.)|Contract.EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c| |
|All others| |PCA.Shift__r.FullName or PCA.Type__r.Name (whichever is populated)| |, PCA.Rate__c, PCA.UnitofMeasure__c|

NOTE:
SCP mentioned there would be only one HPF in this scenario. However we have to accommodate for multiple HPFs, hence group them per HPF. Use the _OR repeat per HPF format in this document_

 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician Contract record
{color:#403294}And the following criteria is met:{color}

* Contract Status = “Approved“
{color:#403294}And {color}
* {color:#403294}[This is a new Contract (Previous Contract field is blank) {color}
{color:#403294}OR {color}
* {color:#403294}Clinician is an Independent Contractor (IC) moving to Employee (EE) employment type]{color}

Then I shall have the ability to click “Generate Term Sheet”, (should NOT be displayed if the criteria above is not met)
Then a document is generated with the following template (attachment = *Conditional Offer Letter (*{color:#403294}*5*{color}*)*),
And the following fields are pulled into the merge fields with the initiating Clinician/Contract details

*Conditional Offer Letter (*{color:#403294}*5*{color}*) -* -delete the following:  “The other terms that govern this agreement can be found at: [*-insert hyperlink*-]” per Greg Bianchi-

* Date = [today’s date]
* Clinician/Clinician Name = Contract.AccountID
* Clinician contact info = [Clinician’s > Mailing Address]
* Insert Title = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue, should only have one job title.)
* Insert Name = [ATS Applicant’s > Hiring Manager’s Name] (Note: multiple values should NOT be an issue.)
* Position = [ATS Applicant’s > Job > Job Title]
* Position Type = Contract.Time_Type__c
* Start Date = Contract.StartDate
* Locations = [Display the contract’s active HPFs *Service Account* name]
* Compensation = [Display the Rates, see below for logic to display]
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Full Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended] per Month
**** Example: $200.00 per Month
** If Employment Type = Employee (EE) AND Time Type = Part Time AND Shift Type = NP/PA, then display:
*** Contract’s “EE NP/PA Hourly Blended”
*** Format = [EE NP/PA Hourly Blended] per Hour
**** Example: $55.00 per Hour
** Else, display
*** Type/Shift Full Name
*** Rate
*** Unit of Measure
*** Format = [Type/Shift Full Name] [Rate] [Unit of Measure]
**** Ex. Day 1 $110 per Hour
* {color:#403294}Anticipated Monthly Clinical Hours {color}= [{color:#403294}Contract{color}> Anticipated Clinical Hours]
* {color:#403294}Special Terms = [Contract > Contract Special Terms]{color}
* -Insert Hyperlink = [NEED HYPERLINK]-
* SCP Employee Name = User.FirstName + User.LastName
* SCP Employee Title = User.Title

And a preview of the generated document is displayed to the initiating user

And Additional actions:

* Cancel
** nothing is generated
** Returned to the Clinician Contact
* Finish (see next AC)

Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps

When I am viewing a term sheet document in preview state,
And I click “Finish”,
Then the document is attached to Contract (RT: Clinician) record as a File {color:#403294}(file name = <ClinicianFullName>-<FacilityName(s)>-<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf) Note to Business: we can follow this format provided, a single contract can have multiple HPFs, so in that scenario we will be listing all. – {color}{color:#403294}*SUGGESTION*{color}{color:#403294}: file name = <ClinicianFullName>-<DateSent>-Termsheet.pdf to avoid a long file name{color}
And user is returned to the Contract record page.

*MOCK*:

!image-20250918-204812.png|width=100%,alt="image-20250918-204812.png"!

--Split to story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|smart-link] –
-Given I am a Recruiter within the Corporate Support apps-
-When I am on Contract record page,-
-And I click “Send Term Sheet for Signature”-
-When No Term Sheet present:-
-Show message to user “Please generate term sheet before sending for signature”.-
-When Term sheet is already generated (based on file attachments)-
-Then the document is sent via DocuSign to the Clinician’s email address on the related Person Account record-

* -Recipient = Clinician’s Email-
* -CC = Recruiter (user’s email)-

-Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support apps-
-When the document is signed by the Clinician,-
-And the Integration (via DocuSign) has updated the Contract field “Term Sheet Executed” = checked-
-Then from the Contract tab List View = Clinician Term Sheet Executed-

* -Filter = Contract Record Type = Clinician, Term Sheet Executed = Checked-
* -Fields to Display: Contract Number, Account Name, Status, Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Owner Alias-

-And I navigate to a clinician Contract record with a term sheet-
-And I navigate to Files section (Files Tab on Contract),-
-Then I can view the Signed Term sheet document as file attached there.-

-NOTE: for confirmed during refinement that we want to pull the stars for the term sheet location & compensation (rate + unit of measure)-

Generate Term Sheet - Term Sheet Generation

None
 
07/Oct/25 3:57 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Critical TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-4464, PR1050558-3329, PR1050558-3674, PR1050558-4564, PR1050558-4667, PR1050558-3234, PR1050558-3323, PR1050558-3623, PR1050558-4726, PR1050558-5319, PR1050558-2235, PR1050558-2554, PR1050558-2791, PR1050558-2947, PR1050558-4553 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2785
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3055, PR1050558-3119, PR1050558-2840 As part of the existing Clinician Contract submit request OS,
*non full time employee NP/PA clinician* // Clinician Prof title = NP or PA (Code Set Shift Type = NP/PA), Contract.Employment_Type__c = Employee and Contract.Time_Type__C != full time
In the HPF selection screen, where we display the list of HPF (as rows) with fields as columns ( in data table),
Add the column Hour Commitment. [~accountid:61c036c29ee70a0068954daf] need to know which field this should be mapped to
Contract > CPA > PCA 9/15: Map to HPF field (added by data migration) = [*No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Work__c*] with *History Tracking enabled.*
Flow on PCA record - each time a record is added,
If NPPA_Tier__c field is specified on the Clinician contract, then calculate the following and update the values of on the fields.
Hourly rate = Get the Rate__c from PCA where Unit of measure = per hour, for the Contract
Total Hourly rate = Calculate the sum of the rates
Avg Hourly rate = Total Hourly rate / number of HPF records.
EE_NPPA_Hourly_Blended__c = Avg Hourly rate
EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Overage_Rate__c = Avg Hourly rate + 2

EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Monthly_Blended__c = Avg Hourly rate * ClinicianContract.NPPA_Tier__c

EE_NPPA_Full_Time_Weekly_Blended__c = Avg Hourly rate * 40
The same calculation should also take place the first time NPPA tier is added the first time - on contract request oS

rate should be computed when rates are changed

Consider only CPA of type Shift. Do not include shift of type Bonus 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC 1 covered under [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2235|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2235|smart-link]

+Clinician Side:+

-Given I am a Recruiter in the corporate support apps-
-When I request a contract for a- *-full time employee NP/PA-* -clinician-
-Then I can specify NP/PA Tier for that clinician-

* -If Service Accounts from selected HPFs have the same NP/PA Tier-
** -Default NP/PA Tier and do not show a selection (show value, but read only)-
* -If Service Accounts from selected HPFs do not have the same NP/PA Tier-
** -Recruiter must select one NP/PA Tier from what values (unique values) are available at those facilities-
** -And an approval record is created for Account Team Regional Director of NPPA Services to review NP/PA Tier mismatch-

AC2

Given I am a Recruiter in the corporate support apps
When I request a contract for a *non full time employee NP/PA clinician*
Then I can specify Hour Commitment per HPF selected (number, 3 digits no decimals) - _9/15 NEW FIELD NOT NEEDED. Map to HPF field (added by data migration) = [*_No_of_Hours_Anticipated_to_Workc*_] with_ *_History Tracking enabled._*

NOTE for AC2: UI for capturing this information was developed as part of story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2791|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2791|smart-link], but as part of this story we need to implement mapping to the field listed and turn on history tracking. As well as adding additional rules to support capturing hour commitment/Anticipated Clinical hours for ONLY *non full time employee NP/PA clinician*.
If the clinician meets the following criteria: *full time employee NP/PA*, then do NOT let the user capture Hour Commitment/Anticipated Clinical Hour.

AC3
Given I am a Payroll team member in the Corporate Support apps
When EE NP/PA rates are specified for a clinician (using per hour unit of measure)
Then the following calculations are done automatically:

* EE NP/PA Full Time Weekly Blended
** Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs * 40
* EE NP/PA Hourly Blended
** Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs
* EE NP/PA Full Time Overage Rate
** Hourly Rate averaged across all HPFs + $2
* EE NP/PA Full Time Monthly Blended
** EE NP/PA Hourly Blended * NP/PA Tier

additional notes:
_FT EE NP/PA clinicians have one monthly salary blended in contract_
_PT EE NP/PA clinicians have one hourly blended rate in contract_
_for FT and PT - QGenda stores blended hourly rate_
_for FT - Workday stores annual salary_
_for PT - Workday stores hourly blended rate_
if clinician has Night Shift Bonus, sent to QGenda and applies only for some shifts 		07/Oct/25 3:57 PM   4 image-20250916-183009.png 10/Sep/25 12:14 PM SCP Sprint 10 10/Sep/25 12:14 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzg 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Clinician Contract Specialist, I need to view NP/PA tiers and where clinicians are expected to practice, so that I can generate contracts accurately

NP/PA Tier Management: Clinician 2 of 2

None

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3057, PR1050558-3121, PR1050558-3252 Scheduled Flow Name - PNC Scheduled FLow
-Scheduled Flow or Batch job-
Query for PNC records where Termination Date = TODAY
NOTE: PNC contains HPF (which contains Practitioner/Clinician and Service Account) and Clinician Contract,
Query for PNC where COntract record type is Clinician and HPF.Account = Service Account
From those PNC records,
Create offboarding Case ( RT : Clinician Offboarding)
WhatId = Clinician
Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>

Voluntary Termination = True

Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”
If employee Type = Employee, Independent Contractor, Partner

Exit Interview Requirement = False/Unchecked

Bonus Repayment = True/Checked

As part of existing logic of 2473, where we update HPF to inactive when all offboarding tasks are completed, check if there are other HPFs for the clinicians that are active. If records are found (active hpfs found) do nothing
if no records found, then update the Contract


Update the Clinician *Clinician’s contract Status = Canceled & Cancel Reason = Terminated* when 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist in the Corporate Support apps
When a Legal team member has completed the “Begin Facility Termination” guided experience
Then if the related Service Account(s) on the Client Contract (RT: Client Contract) has a “Termination Date”, then on the *night of* the “Termination Date” the the following actions shall occur:

* For *each HPF (not in Status = Inactive) related to the terminated Service Account* the system shall automatically create the *Clinician Offboarding Cases* with the following information based on Employment Type: [leverage functionality build in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1727|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1727|smart-link]]
** Employment Type = Employee, Independent Contractor, Partner
*** Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination = True/Checked
*** Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”
*** Exit Interview Requirement = False/Unchecked
*** Bonus Repayment = True/Checked
** Employment Type = Leased, Locum, Managed
*** Date Termination Received = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Termination Request Date = <PNC’s Termination Date>
*** Last Day = <PNC’s Termination Date>
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination = True/Checked
*** Reason for Termination = “Hospital Contract Termination”

Then after the current existing Clinician Offboarding automation/functionality will begin for auto Task Creation, Case Closure, Healthcare Practitioner Facility updates (including inactivation on “Effective To” date) [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1728|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1728|smart-link], [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2421|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2421|smart-link], [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2473|smart-link]

-And the system shall update the- *-Clinician’s Contract Status = Canceled & Cancel Reason = Terminated-* -when: [-*-NEW-*-]-

* -ALL the HPF records related to the- *-Clinician Contract-* -record are in Status = Inactive.- this is updated as part of offboarding automation

Note: Unlike the “Initiate Termination Request” process initiate by the Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist, the Client Termination can be months out, so it was decided that the creation of Clinician Offboarding cases should Only be triggered on the Date of Client Termination. 		13/Oct/25 11:36 AM   5 09/Sep/25 8:16 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 11 25/Sep/25 10:46 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzer 04/Feb/26 11:14 AM As a Medical Staff Liaison, Data Quality & Clinician Experience Specialist, once the legal team has completed the “Begin Facility Termination”, then on the *Client Contract’s Termination Date*, I want the Clinician Facility Offboarding Cases/tasks to be automatically created, so that HPFs can be inactivated and Clinician Contracts can be terminated as needed.

Facility Term: Date of Client Termination Triggers Auto Clinician Offboarding Process

Update the critieria for task creation to include Partner Employee type 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a *Medical Staff Liaison, CET user, or Data Quality team member* in the Corporate Support apps
When I view a *Clinician* record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details -
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not -Prospect or- Inactive AND Employment Type is *Partner*):
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically populated to today)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required)
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Employment Type AND Voluntary Termination, required)
**** Employment Type = Partner and Voluntary = TRUE: Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment
**** Employment Type = Partner and Voluntary = FALSE: Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied
*** Exit Interview Requirement (checkbox, optional)
*** Bonus Repayment (checkbox, optional)
*** Backfill Recommended (checkbox, optional)
*** Ability to attach files
* Clinician Offboarding case is created with Rehirable checkbox defaulted to TRUE

And Update Facility Offboarding task below to send to HR Queue for Employment Type = Employee*, or Partner*

|Review Contract for Termination|Parent Case = Facility Offboarding|When Employment Type = Employee*, or Partner* HR Queue

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2944, PR1050558-2945, PR1050558-2862 These are manual changes.
Create a new Record type of Case: Clinician Change
Add picklist option to Type : Military Status Change

Add the fields mentioned below to layout and LRP.

* Subject = Military Status change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Military Status Change” (required)
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

Before Save flow on Case:
Filter based on Record type : Clinician Change
Set Case Owner to Data Quality queue
Conditions if Type = Military Status Change
Set the Subject to Military Status change for <Clinician>

Trigger Points:

Standard Option : Clinician > Cases related list > new single related list added to LRP - Preferred 		0 Kristin Koide 1 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Ability to create a case for Data Quality team for Military Status Change
Given I am a internal corporate support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to the Clinician record
When a Clinician’s Military Status changes
Then from the Clinician record, I have the ability to create a Case with Record Type = “Clinician Change”
And upon initial case creation of record type = Clinician Change:

* Subject = Military Status change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Military Status Change”
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

NOTE: once case is created for the data quality team, internal manual actions will need to occur as done currently. Data team will need to manually close the case once all actions are complete.

QA Team: per the design, “Type” will be the first field to answer.

----

Below is information from the Kristi’s email, but Phase 1 requirements are listed in the AC.

# +*Military Status Change Requests*+
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in their military status (i.e. called to active duty (deployment), retirement, etc.)
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Status change to ______
#** Effective date
#** Length of deployment (if known)
#** Option to attach documents to support the military status change
#* Case or task would remain open until the Data Quality team would confirm the new military status (pull SCRA Query, update QGenda Credentialing- system of record).  
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to:
#** Group emails that are currently associated with the military status checkbox in Salesforce
#*** for RCS
#*** Provider Enrollment
#*** Who else?? 		24/Sep/25 12:58 PM   4 09/Sep/25 11:44 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 11/Sep/25 8:15 AM 1|i08c0x:tzy 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an internal corporate support user, when a Clinician’s Military Status changes, I want the ability to create a case for the Data Quality team so that internal manual processes can begin. 19/Sep/25

Given I am a internal corporate support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to the Clinician record
When a Clinician’s Business Entity changes
Then from the Clinician record, I have the ability to create a Case with Record Type = “Clinician Change”
And upon initial case creation of record type = Clinician Change:

* Subject = Business Entity change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Business Entity Change”
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

NOTE: once case is created for the data quality team, internal manual actions will need to occur as done currently. Data team will need to manually close the case once all actions are complete.

QA Team: per the design, “Type” will be the first field to answer.

----

Below is information from the Kristi’s email, but Phase 1 requirements are listed in the AC.

# Need for any corporate Support User with access to the Clinician record. Create a *Case* from the Clinician record for Data quality to inform a name is change
## User can add any additional description as needed
## Related to the Clinician
## Subject = Business Entity Change for <Clinician name>
## Type = Business Entity Change
## Record Type = Clinician Change
## Case Owner = Data Quality queue
## Status = Not Started
### NOTE: Then manual activity to do the updates
# +*Business Entity Change Requests*+
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in entity OR if changing their payroll status from an entity to their SSN
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Name of current provider entity in the system
#** New name of provider entity
#** Option to attach documents to support the entity change
#* Case or task would remain open until the Data Quality team would confirm the new entity information (create new CTI Record) and terminate/end date old CTI record.  
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to:
#** Contracting – requires a name change amendment- should this create a new contract request and send directly to the contracting queue for generation? Or sent to recruiter/CET to request?
#** Payroll (EE and/or IC 		24/Sep/25 1:03 PM   3 09/Sep/25 11:43 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 17/Sep/25 10:57 AM 1|i08c0x:tzr 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an internal corporate support user, when a Clinician’s Business Entity Change, I want the ability to create a case for the Data Quality team so that internal manual processes can begin. 19/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2709, PR1050558-2747, PR1050558-2860 Create a new Record type of Case: Clinician Change
Add picklist option to Type : Name Change

Add the fields mentioned below to layout and LRP.

* Subject = Clinician Name change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Name Change”
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

Before Save flow on Case:
Filter based on Record type : Clinician Change
Set Case Owner to Data Quality queue
Conditions if Type = Name change
Set the Subject Clinician Name change for <Clinician>

Trigger Points:

Standard Option : Clinician > Cases related list > new single related list added to LRP - Preferred


// Custom Option : Custom button “Create Clinician Change” - Screen flow, to capture the fields mentioned above. 		0 Kristin Koide 1 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Ability to create a case for Data Quality team for Name Change
Given I am a internal corporate support user within the Corporate Support apps
And I have access to the Clinician record
When there is a Clinician Name change
Then from the Clinician record, I have the ability to create a Case with Record Type = “Clinician Change”
And upon initial case creation of record type = Clinician Change:

* Subject = Clinician Name change for <Clinician> (system to set upon save)
* Description = <user inserts additional information as needed>
* Contact Name = <system pre-populates with the Clinician’s name>
* Type = User can select “Name Change” (required)
* Status = “Not Started” (default)
* Priority = “Medium” (default)
* Case Origin = “Manual” (default)
* Case Owner = “Data Quality” queue

NOTE: once case is created for the data quality team, internal manual actions will need to occur as done currently. Data team will need to manually close the case once all actions are complete.

QA Team: per the design, “Type” will be the first field to answer.

----

Below is information from the Kristi’s email, but Phase 1 requirements are listed in the AC.

# +*Provider Name Change Requests*+-
#* Need a case or task for users to create when they are notified by the clinician of a change in name
#* Case or task needs to be assigned to the Data Quality Queue
#* Requirements needed with the case/task-
#** Name of provider in the system
#** New name of provider
#** Reason for change (marriage, divorce, citizenship, other)
#** Option to attach documents to support the name change
#* Case or task would remain open until the ‘name change’ process is completed (all required supporting documentation received and Salesforce updated with new name… integration should update both QGenda Systems)
#* Once the case/task closes, a notification needs to be automatically sent to multiple downstream systems and/or departments, to notify them of the change, to include:
#** Workday, if EE provider
#** Athena
#** Provider Enrollment Team
#** IT (for updating in the provider’s OKTA profile, etc.)
#** Contracting – requires a name change amendment- should this create a new contract request and send directly to the contracting queue for generation? Or sent to recruiter/CET to request?
#** Notice to the account team of the change, especially the PCC and CET
#** Payroll (EE and/or IC)
#** Discussion for other impacts/systems/teams that need to know… 		24/Sep/25 1:04 PM   3 09/Sep/25 11:35 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 17/Sep/25 12:21 PM 1|i08c0x:ty 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As an internal corporate support user, when a Clinician’s name changes, I want the ability to create a case for the Data Quality team so that internal manual processes can begin. 19/Sep/25

Clinician Name Change Requests

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1862, PR1050558-1918, PR1050558-2858 Object = *Contract*

* NPPA_Tier_Changed__c → Formula

Object = *Shift*

* Existing Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Type Added?
* New Shift Bonus Type Added
* Is Deleted?

Create a Record Triggered Flow for Shift Object Record New or Update Records:

When the Records is Created or Updated

* When the Cloned_From__c Is NULL
** Query for All Shift Records for the Contract where Type__c = CurrentRecord.Type__c AND Shift_Name__c = CurrentRecord.Shift_Name__c AND Cloned_From__c != NULL
*** If Records are returned then Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = true, New_Shift_Type_Added__c = false
*** Else New_Shift_Type_Added__c = true, Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c = false
* When the Cloned_From__c != NULL && Is_Deleted__c is updated
** Query for All *PreventiveCareAgreement* Records for the Contract where Shift__c = [CurrentRecord.Id|http://CurrentRecord.Id]
*** When Shift__c, CurrentRecord.Is_Deleted__c = true
**** Update all *PreventiveCareAgreement* records returned *PreventiveCareAgreement*.Is_Deleted__c = true
*** When Shift__c, CurrentRecord.Is_Deleted__c = false
**** Update all *PreventiveCareAgreement* records returned *PreventiveCareAgreement*.Is_Deleted__c = false



When I am in Setup on Object = *Rate Pay Code*

Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Is_Newly_Added__c → Formula
* Update the *Subflow Clone All Contract Child Records* flow to include the feature to Clone for *Rate Pay Code*
** Cloned From? Lookup to be populated from where this record is cloned



When I am in Setup on Object = *Preventive Care Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Before Save Flow: Create a new before save flow for object *Preventive Care Agreement* update the field
** Existing Rate Increased? → Formula
** Existing Rate Decreased? → Formula
** Is Newly Added? → Formula
** New Shift Type Added? → Formula
** New Shift Bonus Type Added? → Formula
** Existing Shift Type Added? → Formula
* -Systematically Copied from Previous Contract (not Cloned)?-
** [~accountid:61c036c29ee70a0068954daf] -When is the story- *-Change need to be updated to ALL Forward Client Contract (limiting to only one draft contract there could be only one Forward Contract i.e. Coverage Change)-*
* Is Deleted? (existing field - added here for completeness)
* Over Rate? → Change to Formula to ignore Is_Deleted__c = true



When I am in Setup on Object = *Contract Payment Agreement*
Then the following new fields are create (should be visible in Page Layout as Read Only - Check Data Dictionary for Details)

* Rate Increased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Increase__c" field)
* Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
* Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
* New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
* Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)



Flow for updating the Summary:

* When the Contract Status where Record Type = *Clinician* or *Practice Operations* is updated to Status = -Submitted- Executed then a Record Triggered Flow is update below fields
** *Preventive Care Agreement*
For each *Preventive Care Agreement* records select query all related records *Rate Pay Code* records and count the below field and update the count into the corresponding *Preventive Care Agreement* records using Rate_Pay_Code__c.Preventive_Care_Agreement__c
*** Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c -> (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
*** Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c → (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c" field)
** *Contract Payment Agreement (*Perform all this in a single Loop of all records *Preventive Care Agreement* records)
*** For each *Contract Payment Agreement* records select query all related records *Preventive Care Agreement* records and count the below field and update the count into the *Contract Payment Agreement* records using PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreementId
**** Rate Increased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Increase__c" field)
**** Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
**** Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
**** New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
**** Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
**** New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
**** Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
**** Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
**** Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)
*** -For each- *-Contract Payment Agreement-* -records select query all related Shift__c records- *-Preventive Care Agreement-* -records and count based on logic below and update the count into the- *-Contract Payment Agreement-* -records using PreventiveCareAgreement.ContractPaymentAgreementId-
**** -Mixed Bag Shift Rates-
***** -For one of the FacilityTitle__c if SUM(Rate__c)/ COUNT(Id) != MIN(Rate__c) then Set the Mixed Bag Shift Rates = 1-
****** -Query:SELECT FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c, COUNT(Id), SUM(Rate__c), MIN(Rate__c) FROM ContractPaymentAgreement-
-GROUP BY FacilityTitle__c, Shift__r.Shift_Name__c- 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a system administrator within the Corporate Support apps

* Rate Decreased? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Rate_Decreased__c" field)
* Net New Entry Rate? (Display the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Newly_Added__c?" field)
* New Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* Existing Shift Type Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Existing_Shift_Type_Added__c" field) - Number of new shifts
* New Shift Bonus? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "New_Shift_Bonus_Type_Added__c" field)
* Is Deleted (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Is_Deleted__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Added? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Added__c" field)
* Rate Pay Code Remove? (Displays the sum of Preventive Care Agreement "Rate_Pay_Code_Remove_c" field)

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3322, PR1050558-3379 0 Kristin Koide Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Initiate Clinician Termination
Given I am a {color:#bf2600}VP Operations (VPO){color} user within the Corporate Support apps
When a Facility (Service Account) has been selected via the “Begin Facility Termination” guided process
And a Facility Offboarding child case = *Clinician Review* has been created
Then from the “Clinician Roster” tab I can select one or more clinician record [Story [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1800|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1800|smart-link] ]
And I can take the following Actions: (currently the MSL views the Clinician record and can select “Initiate Termination Request”)

* Full SCP Termination - this will auto create SCP Clinician Offboarding cases (current Clinician Offboarding process makes the MSL check a box to confirm “Full SCP Termination”
* Facility Termination Only - Clinician has other active HPFs {color:#bf2600}--- Question: for each Clinician would the info below be the same or could it differ?{color}
** If selected Clinician(s) Employment Type = *Employee or Independent Contractor* [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|smart-link] & [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2471|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2471|smart-link]
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically populated to today)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required) *update placement to after Termination Request Date*
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Employment Type AND Voluntary Termination, required)
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = TRUE*: Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = FALSE*: Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied
**** *Employment Type = Independent Contractor*: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with Facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider. Per Risk Manager, Privilege Expiration
*** Exit Interview Requirement (checkbox, optional)
*** Bonus Repayment (checkbox, optional)
*** *Backfill Recommended (checkbox, optional)*
*** Ability to add files
** If selected Clinician(s) Employment Type is *Locums*[https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2015|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2015|smart-link]
*** Last Day (date, required)
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically captured)
**** Help Text: date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Voluntary Termination, required when condition met)
**** picklist values to be provided - must align with Workday and Asymbl (why an open req was created due to clinician exit)
*** Ability to attach files
** If selected Clinician(s) Employment Type ={color:#bf2600} Leased, Managed, Partner???{color}
*** {color:#bf2600}What should happen? {color} 		16/Sep/25 9:19 PM   1 07/Sep/25 7:34 PM SCP Sprint 10 1|i08c0x:ti 12/Nov/25 1:24 PM As a {color:#bf2600}VP Operations (VPO){color}, when a facility is being terminated, I want to identify if Clinician(s) should be terminated from just the facility (HPF) or from SCP (no active HPF) so that clinician offboarding cases & tasks can be automatically created.

** Filter: Parent Case = BLANK, Status ≠ Closed

* Related List = Closed Cases
** Filter: Parent Case = BLANK, Status = Closed

* The new Open and Closed Cases related list are not specific to a Record Type (visibility to see the different record types are based on the user’s current access)

And I have access to view Contract (RT: Client Contract) records & Client Offboarding Cases
Then on the a Contract (RT: Client Contract) record, on the Related tab I can see: (NO Actions available)

* Related list = Open Cases
** Filter: Parent Case = BLANK, Status ≠ Closed
** Fields Displayed: Subject, Account Name, Case Record Type, Type, Priority, Status, Owner, Last Modified Date/Time
* Related List = Closed Cases
** Filter: Parent Case = BLANK, Status = Closed

NOTE:

* The new Open and Closed Cases related list are not specific to a Record Type (visibility to see the different record types are based on the user’s current access)
* Creation of new Client Offboarding case record type is part of [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-1683|smart-link] 		08/Oct/25 9:59 AM   3 image-20250910-220437.png 07/Sep/25 5:39 PM SCP Sprint 10 23/Sep/25 5:41 AM 1|i0e6t7: 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Internal Corporate Support user with access to Contract (RT: Client Contract) records, I want the ability to see related Client Offboarding cases, so that I can see all the Service Accounts that are being terminated.

07/Oct/25 2:00 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider 360 Accepted   Medium InTADesign Jasmine Moradi   PR1050558-5385, PR1050558-889 harshgupta Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2633
No permission
 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3062, PR1050558-3126, PR1050558-3259 0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an a SCP Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps,
When I navigate to the Person Account Clinician record At a Glance tab,
Then I see: (NOTE: these are UPDATES to existing At a Glance)

* A key/legend at the top displaying:
** Grey Circle Icon “Not Started”
** Blue + White Circle Icon “In Progress”
** Green Circle with Check Icon “Completed”
* In the Applicant section:
** For the following Status/Labels, once it is marked “Completed” it should NOT revert back to “Not Started” or “In Progress” as the ATS Applicant record stage progresses.
*** Application Submitted
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Submission”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Recruiter Screen”, “Awaiting Intake Form”, “Presenting”, “Interview”, “Offer”, “Term Sheet”, “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Recruiter Screen
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Recruiter Screen”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Awaiting Intake Form”, “Presenting”, “Interview”, “Offer”, “Term Sheet”, “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Candidate Presentation
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Interview”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Offer”, “Term Sheet”, “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Verbal Offer
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Term Sheet”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Term Sheet
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Contracting”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Placement”

Given a Clinician in the HC Portal

When I navigate to the Home tab, and view At a Glance information
Then I see:

* A key/legend at the top displaying:
** Grey Circle Icon “Not Started”
** Blue + White Circle Icon “In Progress”
** Green Circle with Check Icon “Completed”
* In the Applicant section:
** For the following Status/Labels, once it is marked “Completed” it should NOT revert back to “Not Started” or “In Progress” as the ATS Applicant record stage progresses.
*** Job Application In Process
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Submission”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Recruiter Screen”, “Awaiting Intake Form”, “Presenting”, “Interview”, “Offer”, “Term Sheet”, “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Recruiter Screen
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Recruiter Screen”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Awaiting Intake Form”, “Presenting”, “Interview”, “Offer”, “Term Sheet”, “Contracting”, “Placement”
*** Offer In Process
**** Show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage = “Term Sheet”
***** Still show Completed when ATS Applicant Stage progress to Stage = “Contracting”, “Placement” 		07/Oct/25 2:00 PM   3 image-20250926-041154.png 05/Sep/25 5:40 PM SCP Sprint 10 26/Sep/25 12:13 AM 1|i0e69g:v 02/Feb/26 12:13 PM As a user, I need the ability to view a component that highlights the status(es) of a clinician, so that I am able to understand where they are during their journey with SCP Health. 26/Sep/25

24/Sep/25 12:17 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Matthew Hebert   PR1050558-2929, PR1050558-2928, PR1050558-4433 abhi.kondreddy Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2558

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2715, PR1050558-2753, PR1050558-2842 Record Triggered Flow on Contract, When a new Contract is Executed, and there is an existing contract that is executed,
If Contract.CompanySignedDate >= Contract.StartDate
If Existing Active Contract. End Date is populated and Employment Type of old contract = Employee and New Contract is IC or vice versa, then do the End date update on old contract.
update the Existing Active contract’s End date to newly created contract’s Start date - 1. Use the PreviousContractId to query the Executed contract.
As part of this , update the Old Contract’s status to Cancelled and CancellationReason = Terminated



For scenarios where old contract where EE and new Contract emp type is IC, and vice versa, EE<-> IC
If New IC Contract has PreviousContractid - Use that Id to update the Contract
If New IC Contract does not have previousContractId - Query for Employee Contract with No End Date or EndDate in future - and use that Contract to update if If Contract.CompanySignedDate >= Contract.StartDate





-Scheduled Flow on Contract (to update Contract status)-
-When previous Contract End date = today, then update executed Clinician Contract status to “Canceled”, Cancelled Reason = Superseded-

-When Contract status becomes Executed ( SignedDate is populated), then if there are existing active contracts with End Date in the past, then update the Contract status to Cancelled and Cancel Reason as Terminated. - same employee type , Yes.-
-Scheduled flow on Contracts, Check if a contract EndDate = Today and Contract status != Cancelled and Query for Executed Contracts of the same Employee Type for that Clinician. If its exists, then cancel the contracts.-



[^Clinician-LDD-Integration - Contract Date and Status Update.pdf]

 0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I request a contract for a clinician who already has one executed and active (no end date or end date is not in past)
Then the end date for the already executed & active contract is populated with the new contract’s start date - 1 day
-also update if the End Date on the active contract is already populated and exclude the end date update if the Employment Type/Facility Title has not changed-

Note: the New Contract must be in Status = Executed before setting the End Date on the old contract.

|*Old Contract Employment_Type__c*|*New Contract Employment_Type__c*|*Contract.End Date*|*Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)*|
|Locum|IC|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Locum|Employee|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Employee|IC|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|{color:#ff991f}*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 Update previous Contract Status =*{color}{color:#ff991f} Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Terminated (time based update when the date occurs){color}|
|Employee|Leased|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|IC|Employee|*Start Date of the New Contract - 1*|{color:#ff991f}*On the Start Date of the New Contract - 1 Update previous Contract Status =*{color}{color:#ff991f} Cancelled, Cancelled Reason = Terminated (time based update when the date occurs){color}|
|IC|Leased|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Leased|IC|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|
|Leased|Employee|manual, exclude from this automation|manual, exclude from this automation|

Refinement NOTES (for information) (Questions):

# Should we update the Contract Status when we has and *end date and the End Date hits*? Below rule applies to just the EE to IC scenarios listed above. *–* *_AC added to column = Contract.Status Previous Contract (Use PreviousContractId when available)_*
## Status = Canceled
## Cancel Reason = Terminated
# IF we run a job and find a Contract with an End Date populated an End Date has past, then can we auto set the Contract Status and Cancel Reason? *backlog story (*[+PR1050558-2929+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2929])
# If there is an active contract (old) with a future end date (9/30) & we have a *new* Executed contract starting today (9/16), then do we update the *Old* contract end date to (9/15)? Yes, ok to retro date based on the New Executed Contract’s start date. 		24/Sep/25 12:17 PM   7 image-20250922-124623.png 04/Sep/25 9:04 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 12/Sep/25 7:55 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzx 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Recruiter, I need contract dates to be updated automatically, so dates follow specified business rules 13/Sep/24

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2717, PR1050558-2755, PR1050558-2798, PR1050558-2799, PR1050558-2850 NOTE:
Contract > CPA(n) > PCA (n)
Contract - PNC (Junction) - HPF
Contract has 1 to many CPA . CPA has 1 to many relationship with PCA
CPA record has PNC from which we can know the HPF for the Contract.

Add new Code Set (Locum) and load new Health Cloud Records.


If Contract.Employee Type : Locums is selected,
When Configure Rates for the HPF is selected,
Display the fields mentioned in AC.

Display the Code Set *Code Set (Locum)*
On submit, create the following records with mapping

*Contract Payment Agreement.*Type__c → Locums

*Create PreventiveCareAgreement record for each of the rate type filled*

Monthly Shifts Requested → Shifts_Requested__c

Rate → Rate__c

Unit_of_Measure__c → Default to Per Hour // per hour applies to rate, and per Month for Monthly Shifts requested
Type__c - > Filter CodeSet.CodeSetType = Locum
 0 Jasmine Moradi 13 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Data Quality team member in the Corporate Support apps
When I create a *Clinician Contract* where Employment Type = Locum
Then I am able to add the following rate types *per HPF*:

* Normal Hourly (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “Normal Hourly” Rate)
* Holiday (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “Holiday” Hourly Rate)
* HM On Call (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum HM Flat “On Call” Rate)
* HM Rounding (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum “HM Rounding” Hourly Rate)
* Travel Hourly (currency, 4 digits 2 decimals) (map to Locum Additional “Travel Hourly” Rate)
* Shifts Requested (number, 3 digits 0 decimals) (map to Monthly ‘Shifts Requested”)

_Note: at a client level, locum clinicians have different rates, no need to store at client level_
_Note: Shift Requested, unit of measure will display as “per Month” & on the UI, it will not show the “$” sign._
Note: On the Rate Details step for Type of Rate = Locum we will add to the table a column to show the “# of Shifts” 		24/Sep/25 1:05 PM   6 Captura de pantalla 2025-09-15 a la(s) 7.41.57 a.m..png 03/Sep/25 9:42 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 10/Sep/25 7:56 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzx 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Data Quality team member, I need to enter rates for locums clinician in Salesforce, so that pay can be reported accurately 17/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2719, PR1050558-2757, PR1050558-2834 In the existing Create HPF omniscript, in Clinician Information screen ,
Placement of the checkbox and validation - Update NPI - screen, (existing)


Add a new checkbox ‘No NPI number’
Query for task related to Clinician of type “NPI Number missing “ and status Closed.


Create a validation error message if Clinician Prof title is one of these - “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and No NPI number checkbox is unchecked and if no task if found of type NPI Number missing. Msg - “NPI number is required for this Clinician’s professional title”

If if Clinician Prof title is one of these - “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and No NPI number checkbox is checked, create the task mentioned in AC (via IP from the OS)

NOTE: Future attempts to create HPF - if task of NPI Number missing is closed - no need to display the validation error message, as it was bypassed once already.

As part of Clinician Profile Update intake form - make NPI required if Clinician Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and Practicing Status does not equal student or new graduate
 0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter with access to “Create HPF” guided process in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I use the “Create HPF” guided experiences which ask for NPI
Then I am required to populate NPI when the following criteria are met:

* Clinician’s Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA”

Display the message ““NPI number is required for clinicians with the professional title MD, DO, NP, or PA.””

And when the above criteria are not met, I am able to populate NPI but it is not required

And have Checkbox = “No NPI number” (NEW) - Conditionally visible based on the criteria
Professional Title = NP, PA, MD, DO and
(below) Task is not completed

And if NPI is required (Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA”) and “No NPI number” is checked, then system creates a task:

* Subject = No NPI number for <Clinician>
* Assigned To = Data Quality Queue
* Status = Open
* Due Date = Today
* Priority = High
* Type = NPI Number Missing
* Name = <Clinician>

And if the NPI number is required and there is a “Closed “ task Type = NPI Number Missing, then allow the user to proceed with “Create HPF” guided experience.

Given I am a clinician with access to the HC Portal
When I am completing an *intake form*
Then I am required to populate NPI when the following criteria are met:

* Professional Title equals “MD”, “DO”, “NP”, “PA” and Professional Status -Practicing Status- does not equal student or new graduate. Display the error message “ NPI is required”

And when the above criteria are not met, I am able to populate NPI but it is not required. 		24/Sep/25 1:06 PM   4 Screenshot 2025-09-15 at 9.23.33 AM.png 03/Sep/25 9:22 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 2:26 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhx 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Data Quality team members, I need Salesforce to enforce requirements to collect NPI for some clinicians, so that identifiers are populated when available 18/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2724, PR1050558-2762, PR1050558-2852 Updating of the newly created Offboarding Decision is manual by the user

Use one of the existing flow on Case , Record update flow
Filter for offboarding case record type, where case type = SCP,
If Offboarding Decision is updated to “No longer Exiting”,
Offboarding Case updates

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Canceled
* Child Task updates
** Status = Canceled

If Offboarding Decision field to *Confirmed Exit*,

Get all the HPF for the clinician. Get Case> Account. For the Account, get all HPFs.
Check if last day > TODAY

HPF.Effective To = Case.Last Day

HPF.Contracting Status = Termination In Progress

HPF.Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day

If Case.Last_Day__c < TODAY

HPF.Status = Inactive

HPF.Contracting Status = Terminated

HPF.Termination Date = Last Day

Use Dynamic form in Lightning record page on Case, and display these fields only if Type = SCP and RecordType = Clinician Offboarding

Last Day, Termination Request Date, and Termination Request Received

Check if there is already a story where this was implemented.
when all child tasks are closed, update Offboarding Case

* Status = Closed
* Closed Reason = Complete 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = SCP
Then I am able to update the Offboarding Decision field to *No Longer Exiting*
And the following updates happen automatically:

* Offboarding Case updates
** Status = Closed
** Closed Reason = Canceled
* Child Task updates
** Status = Canceled

Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps

When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = SCP
Then I am able to update the Offboarding Decision field to *Confirmed Exit*
And the following updates happen automatically:

* HPF updates
** Effective To = Last Day
** Contracting Status = Termination In Progress
** Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day
* Offboarding Case updates (occur when all child tasks are closed)
** Status = Closed
** Closed Reason = Complete
* HPF updates (occur when Effective To is in the past)
** Status = Inactive
** Contracting Status = Terminated
** Termination Date = day automation ran
* Person Account updates (occur when Effective To on all HPFs is in the past)
** Status = Inactive

-Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps- (removing, adding to a new backlog story)

-When I navigate to the guided offboarding experience AND a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = Facility-
-Then I am not able to view/edit fields for HPF specific Last Day, Termination Request Date, and Termination Request Received since this lives at the SCP level for full termination-

Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Clinician Offboarding case where Type = Facility
Then when all child tasks are closed and the case is closed
And the following updates happen automatically:

* HPF updates
** Effective To = Last Day
** Contracting Status = Termination In Progress
** Anticipated Termination Date = Last Day
* HPF updates (occur when Effective To is in the past)
** Status = Inactive
** Contracting Status = Terminated
** Termination Date = day automation ran 		24/Sep/25 1:08 PM   6 03/Sep/25 12:28 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 04/Sep/25 11:11 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzzzi 07/Apr/26 1:28 PM As a DMO, I need to indicate a clinician’s final offboarding decision, so that updates can be made automatically as needed 15/Sep/25

update placement of last day field to after Termination Request Date
Add Backfill Recommended field (checkbox, optional)
Ensure Clinician Offboarding case is created with Rehirable checkbox defaulted to TRUE

Add additional filtering option for Reason for Termination picklist option.


||*Employment Type*||*Voluntary*||*Reason for Termination*||
|Employee|true|Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment|
|Employeee|false|Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied|
|Independent Contractor| |Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with Facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider. Per Risk Manager, Privilege Expiration|

Need to update the field on case - picklist values for Reason for termination


|Lack Of Advancement|
|Compensation|
|Management|
|Career Change|
|Retirement|
|School|
|Working Conditions|
|Wrong Job|
|Mutual Agreement|
|Status Change - Provider Use Only|
|Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only|

|Provider Unresponsive|

|Hours of Coverage|
|Accepted Another Job|
|Deceased|
|Not Disclosed|
|Work Environment|
|Lack of Flexibility|
|Job Abandonment|
|Acquisition/Merger|
|Attendance|
|Contract Termination|
|Misconduct|
|Performance|
|Reduction in Force|
|Reorganization|
|Gross Misconduct|
|Violation of Company Policy|
|Provider Inactivity >12 Months|
|Privileges Expired|
|Coverage Discontinued|
|ADA Accommodation Denied|
|Agreement Not Returned|
|Hospital App Not Returned|
|Hospital Contract Termination|
|Insurance Expired|
|Past Issues with Facility|
|PEP Not Returned|
|Per Hospital|
|Per Provider. Per Risk Manager|
|Privilege Expiration| 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a *Medical Staff Liaison, CET user, or Data Quality team member* in the Corporate Support apps
When I view a *Clinician* record
Then I am able to select Initiate Termination Request and see the following:

* Facility Selection - [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-701|smart-link]
* Termination Details - originally built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-306|smart-link]
** Answer each question below per facility (when HPF status is not -Prospect or- Inactive AND Employment Type is Employee or Independent Contractor):
*** Date Termination Received (date, required)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was received
*** Termination Request Date (date, automatically populated to today)
**** Help Text: Date termination request was submitted or automated
*** Last Day (date, required) *update placement to after Termination Request Date*
**** Help Text: Agreement termination date
*** Voluntary Termination (checkbox, optional)
*** Reason for Termination (picklist dependent on Employment Type AND Voluntary Termination, required)
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = TRUE*: Lack Of Advancement, Compensation, Management, Career Change, Retirement, School, Working Conditions, Wrong Job, Mutual Agreement, Status Change - Provider Use Only, Payment Relationship - K-1 Use Only, Family Reasons, Provider Unresponsive, Location, Hours of Coverage, Accepted Another Job, Deceased, Not Disclosed, Work Environment, Lack of Flexibility, Job Abandonment
**** *Employment Type = Employee and Voluntary = FALSE*: Acquisition/Merger, Attendance, Contract Termination, Misconduct, Performance, Reduction in Force, Reorganization, Gross Misconduct, Violation of Company Policy, Provider Inactivity >12 Months, Privileges Expired, Coverage Discontinued, ADA Accommodation Denied
**** *Employment Type = Independent Contractor*: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with Facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider. Per Risk Manager, Privilege Expiration
*** Exit Interview Requirement (checkbox, optional)
*** Bonus Repayment (checkbox, optional)
*** *Backfill Recommended (checkbox, optional)*
*** Ability to attach files
* *Clinician Offboarding case is created with Rehirable checkbox defaulted to TRUE* 		24/Sep/25 1:10 PM   4 image-20250911-014653.png 02/Sep/25 11:54 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 09/Sep/25 2:39 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzzx 07/Apr/26 4:59 PM As a Medical Staff Liaison, I need to terminate a clinician’s employment at a specific facility in Salesforce, so that I can accurately update the status of employees at facilities that SCP staffs for 09/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2726, PR1050558-2764, PR1050558-2849 In the existing oS for Open Shift APAY , add the three fields. The fields are mapped to Case (of record type Rate Approval)

* APAY Used for the Month (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* APAY Budgeted (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Shift Compensation (formula, Shift Duration (first screen) * Clinician Rate (hourly rate entered in second screen, only when unit of measure is per hour).

Updated Help Text on % of Clinicians Contracted to Work to “Recruiting % without Candidates”
* On save,
Rate Approval case record is already being created in submitted status
Create approval process/ modify existing approval process to accommodate the approval mentioned in AC

When APAY Used for the Month + Amount (Shift Compensation formula or amount specified per Shift) - If on the second screen, unit of measure is per hour, is selected - then Use the Shift compensation formula specified as part of this story, if unit of measure is per hour is not selected, then use the Amount .

!image-20250914-222547.png|width=831,height=538,alt="image-20250914-222547.png"!

!image-20250914-222531.png|width=828,height=539,alt="image-20250914-222531.png"! 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then I am able to go through the guided [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-309|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-309|smart-link] process

* APAY Used for the Month (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* APAY Budgeted (currency, 8 digits 0 decimals, required)
* Shift Compensation (formula, length of shift input in first screen * hourly rate entered in second screen, only when unit of measure is per hour)
* Updated Help Text on % of Clinicians Contracted to Work to “Recruiting % without Candidates”

And when I select Save

* Case record is created
** Status = Submitted
* Approval Work Item is created related to the Rate Approval case record
** When APAY Used for the Month + Amount (Shift Compensation formula or amount specified per Shift) in this APAY Request is greater than the APAY Budgeted, assigned To: Account Team - DOO
** All others (else), assigned to Account Team - VPO
** Rate Approval case is locked from being edited
* Approve/Reject Actions
** When users approve/reject they can add comments
** Send Final notification (Rejected or approved) to request submitter and all approvers with comments
** Approved:
*** Case Status updated to Approved
** Not Approved:
*** Case Status updated to Not Approved



Assumption is that the Service Account has the following team roles, if not the approval will be rejected.

* Account Team - DOO
* Account Team - VPO 		24/Sep/25 3:16 PM   4 image-20250914-222531.png 02/Sep/25 11:12 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 10/Sep/25 4:31 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzhzzzzi 02/Mar/26 3:40 PM As a Clinician Experience Specialist or Scheduler, I need to request shift-specific bonus approval in Salesforce, so that I can offer appropriate incentives for clinicians to work a hard-to-staff shift 15/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-2464, PR1050558-2463, PR1050558-2484 Create a Platform Event

* Name: Clinician Offboarding Request (Use same API name in Story - Integration Dependency)
** API Name: Clinician_Offboarding_Request__c
* Fields
** Type: Type__c, Text(200)
** Business Entity Name: Business_Entity_Name__c, Text(200)
** Global Provider Id: Global_Provider_Id__c, Text(200)
** Tax Id: Tax_Id__c, Text(200)
** Reason Description: Reason_Description__c, Text(32000)
** Employee ID: Employee_ID__c, Text(200)
** Termination Date: Termination_Date__c, Date
** Last Day of Work: Last_Day_of_Work__c, Date
** Primary Reason: Primary__Reason__c, Text(200)
** Pay Through Date: Pay_Through_Date__c, Date



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Created*

Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is Created

* Update Contract lookup into Case
** SELECT Id from Contract where Employemnt_Type__c = “Employee” OR Employemnt_Type__c = “Independent Contractor” AND Status = “Executed” Order By CompanySignedDate DESC LIMIT 1
** Update Case.Contract__c = ContractId



Create or Update a Record Triggers Flow Case for *Update*

* Condition: Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete

# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Employee” Then
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding_Request__e
### Type = “Employee”
### Employee ID = Case.Contact.Employee_Id__c
### Termination Date = Case.Termination_Request_Date__c {color:#ff991f} {color}
### Last Day of Work = Case.Last_Day__c
### Primary Reason = Case.Reason_for_Termination__c
### Reason Description = Case.Description
### {color:#ff991f}Pay Through Date = Case.Last_Day__c - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
### Rehireable__c = Case.Contact.Rehireable__c
# Case > Contract > Employee Type = “Independent Contractor” Then
## {color:#ff991f}SELECT Corporate_Tax_ID__c, Corporation_Name__c FROM Corporation_and_Tax_Information__c WHERE Clinician__c = Case.ContactId AND Expiration_Date__c <> null AND Status__c = “Verified' ORDR BY Effective_Date__c DESC LIMIT 1 - Review this logic {color}[~accountid:712020:7c226bec-924b-4638-a65d-349a3d91b34b] , [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]
## Create a Platform Event record Clinician_Offboarding_Request__e
### Type = “Independent Contractor”
### Business Entity Name = {color:#ff991f}Corporation_Name__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Global Provider Id = Case.Contact.Global_Provider_ID__c
### Tax Id = {color:#ff991f}Corporate_Tax_ID__c{color} from STEP 2.a
### Reason Description = Case.Description 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project -Given I am an Integration User in the HC org-
-When a case record where Record Type = Clinician Offboarding and Type = SCP is updated so that Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete-
-Create a custom Platform Event with the following:-

* -Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request-
** -Type = “Terminate IC”-
** -Business Entity Name-
** -Global Provider Id-
** -Tax Id-
** -Reason Description-
*** -Values: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider, Per Risk Manager, Privileges-
** -insurance expiration date - view HPF value on Case-
** -privilege expiration date - view HPF value on Case-
* -Platform Event, Name = Clinician Offboarding Request-
** -Type = “Terminate EE”-
** -Employee ID-
** -Termination Date = Last Day (Offboarding Case)-
** -Last Day of Work = Last Date Worked (HPF, could be blank, if multiple use the most recent)-
** -Primary Reason = Reason for Termination (Offboarding Case)-
** -Reason Description = should not be different than Primary Reason, we don’t have a free text field for this built-
** -Pay Through Date = Pay Through Date (Offboarding Case)-
** -Rehireable = Eligible for Rehir-

Given I am a Corporate Support user in the Corporate Support apps

When I attempt to close a Clinician Offboarding (Type = SCP) to Status = Closed and Closed Reason = Complete
Then I am not able to save if all of the fields below are not populated:

* Date Termination Received
* Termination Request Date
* Last Day
* Pay Through Date (create this field to default to 'Last Day' but can be updated if needed)
* Reason for Termination - finalized list was provided via email JM to update
* Primary Reason
** Values: Agreement Not Returned, Coverage Discontinued, Deceased, Hospital App Not Returned, Hospital Contract Termination, Insurance Expired, Past Issues with facility, PEP Not Returned, Per Hospital, Per Provider, Per Risk Manager, Privileges

And I receive the following error message: “Required fields to complete SCP offboarding are not populated. Please review.” 		26/Sep/25 3:04 PM   5 Screenshot 2025-09-08 at 1.40.18 PM.png 02/Sep/25 11:18 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 02/Sep/25 11:18 AM 1|i08pz4:zzzzi 04/Feb/26 2:46 PM As an Integration User, I need to know when a clinician is leaving SCP, so that I can remove that clinician from Workday 10/Sep/25
