 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2734, PR1050558-2771 Create new field Insurance Provided By on HPF. Add to layout.

Add a row to existing Custom Metadata, to capture the table of Facility title and Insurance provided by.
When HPF is created ( using flow trigger),
Use the custom metadata, to auto-populate the Insurance provided by field on HPF.

Validation Rule on HPF
HPF> Facility title ! = Locum && HPF. Insurance Provided by == SCP Insured Locums OR Locum Company
OR
HPF> Facility title == External Locums, HPF.Insurance Provided By = SCP OR Commercial OR Hospital
Throw validation error “The selected value is invalid for this clinician’s HPF“

0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When I attempt the following changes on a Healthcare Practitioner Facility record
Then I am unable to save

* *Non-External Locums using Locums Insurance*
** IF Facility Title does not equal External Locums, Insurance Provided By = SCP Insured Locums OR Locum Company
* *External Locums using Non-Locums Insurance*
** If Facility Title equals External Locums, Insurance Provided By = SCP OR Commercial OR Hospital

And I receive the following error message at the Insurance Provided By field: “The selected value is invalid for this clinician’s HPF”



Given I am a MSL in the Corporate Support apps
When a HPF record is created
Then the Insurance Provided By field is populated according to the logic below:

* If Facility Title is External Locums - Locum Company
* If Facility Title is Leased Employee or Leased Medical Director - Hospital
* If Facility Title is Managed - Hospital
* For all others - use the Insurance Provided By value on the Service Account record 		24/Sep/25 12:30 PM   3 28/Aug/25 9:51 AM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 15/Sep/25 2:57 PM 1|i08pz4:zzzz9 23/Mar/26 9:55 AM As a MSL, I need the Insurance Provided By field to have validation rules defined, so that the field is populated with the valid values 12/Sep/25

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-3067, PR1050558-3131, PR1050558-3277 Use Service__c.Account__c to get the Service Account

Story to cover

!image-20250904-021151.png|width=1101,height=530,alt="image-20250904-021151.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Job Requisition Handoff to Asymbl

Given I am a *Sales VP* in the Corporate Support Apps
When I navigate to an *Opportunity* record (RT: Growth Opportunity)
And I have updated “Green Light for Client Outreach” to Checked/True
Then the system shall create one task per Service Account (Opportunity Services in Active) and assigned to the *VP Operations* based on the Account Team role.

* Subject: Create Job Req for <Service Account Name>
* Assigned To: *VP Operations*
* Status: Open
* Due Date: <3 days from create date>
* Priority: Normal
* Comments: <1. Navigate to the Service Account in the system. 2. Click on the 'Related' tab to view connected pieces such as contracts, accounts, and opportunities. 3. Click 'New' on the job layout to initiate job creation.>
* Related To: <Service Account>

And if the VP Operations team member has not been setup, then default the Assigned To = *Sales VP* (user who gave the “green light” the one there make this change)

Note: *VP Operations* Account Team role should be already added to the Service Account at this point. 		09/Oct/25 3:51 PM   4 image-20250904-021151.png 27/Aug/25 3:17 PM SCP Sprint 10 24/Sep/25 6:25 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzzizi 29/Jan/26 9:06 PM As a Sales VP, when I identify that an Opportunity is “Green Light for Client Outreach”, then information needs to go to Asymbl, so that we can start early onboarding activities. 01/Oct/25

Clinician Contracting - Job Requisition Handoff to Asymbl

None

24/Sep/25 12:28 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   Low TADesignComplete Brou, James   Abhinav Mishra Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-2238

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1874, PR1050558-1930, PR1050558-2838 Use the existing omniscript of creating PCA record, where we get the rates from the client contract (that are executed, and there is a Create PCA and CPA step.
For these Client Contracts, Get Contract Payment Agreement > Preventive Care Agreement > Rate Pay code (for Shift PCA records)

Use PCA’s Facility Title . Shift, Type and CPA’s type to match the records on which to insert rate pay code
ContractPaymentAgreement - has both Service Account and Contract
Rate Pay code is child of Preventive Care agreement
Preventive care agreement is child of Contract Payment Agreement (MD)
Preventive care agreement is child of Contract and has lookup to PNC

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2338, PR1050558-2282, PR1050558-2495 Create the fields mentioned in the story and DD, on Service Account and HPF.
Provide access to Integration user and any persona that has access to te object 		0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am an Integration User
Then I can access the following fields:

* Service Account
** Account Hospital Site - what type of hospital - LTAC, Urgent Care, Hospital - single select - Service Account level
** Billing Company - which billing company or if non billed - single select - Service Account level
** Client Startup Date - date the client started with SCP - Service Account level
** Contract Termination (Client Termination Date in Corp org today) - date client terminated with SCP - Service Account level
** *Paper Hospital App* - QGenda SOR, split since this is QGenda to Salesforce
** Toll Free Number - Service Account level
** *Accreditation Agency* - SF to QGenda today, future is QGenda to Salesforce
* Healthcare Practitioner Facility
** Termination Date - date provider was inactivated at that PFA, +formerly known as TSG Inactive Date+
** *Received Current Completed References* - QGenda to Salesforce, split since this is QGenda to Salesforce
** *Status* (CredLocationStaff) - in QGenda this is the credentialing status at a location and appointments level, Credentialling Status field, tied to *Temp Inactive Reason*

not bold = Salesforce to QGenda Credentialing

*bold* = QGenda to Salesforce 		24/Sep/25 6:45 PM   4 15/Aug/25 4:37 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 25/Aug/25 6:43 PM 1|i08pz4:zzy 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As an Integration User, I need access to credentialling attributes, so that I can create clinicians in QGenda Credentialling

 Kristin Koide PR1050558-1826, PR1050558-1825, PR1050558-3241 Use Filter By and Specify configure related list based on AC and add to Contract Record page 0 Jasmine Moradi 3 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Update ”Clinician Term Sheet Executed” list view from [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2907|smart-link] +&+ [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-425|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-425|smart-link]
Given I am a Clinician Contracting Specialist within the Corporate Support apps
When I am on the Contracts tab
Then I want to combine existing List View = “Clinician Term Sheet Executed” & “All Clinician Contracts - Approved”

* New List View Name: -“All Clinician Contracts - Approved- {color:#403294}-& Term Sheet Executed-{color}-”- (Updated name - 40 char max: Clinician - Approved & Term Sheet Exectd)
* Filter: Contract Record Type = Clinician AND {color:#403294}(Status = Approved OR Term Sheet Executed = true/checked){color}
* Fields to Display: Contract Number, Account Name, Employment Type, Status, {color:#403294}Term Sheet Executed,{color} Contract Start Date, Contract End Date, Contract Approval Date, {color:#403294}Previous Contract{color}, Contract Owner Alias

Notes:

* Term sheets are for New Contracts (new Clinicians) or IC to EE (per Cline), not for Amendments.
* Confirm process for maintenance process (amendment) will still flow through
** After getting confirmation that Term Sheets are only for New Contracts (Previous Contract field = blank) and for IC to EE, to ensure that there is one place for the Clinician Contracting team to view contracts, I combined the 2 list view into 1.
* Would they every do a Term Sheet for a existing clinician for a new facility? Rate notices should be used in most cases.
* Term Provider and HPF, then have recruiter start on a new effective date (break in coverage) 		07/Oct/25 4:39 PM   4 12/Aug/25 9:32 AM SCP Sprint 10 12/Aug/25 9:32 AM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzhd 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Clinician Contracting Specialist, I need to view clinician contract and rate records, so that I can generate agreements with accurate information

07/Oct/25 10:54 AM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Provider Contracting Accepted   High BuildReviewComplete, TADesignComplete Ryan Woods   PR1050558-3991, PR1050558-3325, PR1050558-3337, PR1050558-3673, PR1050558-301, PR1050558-1582, PR1050558-1703, PR1050558-4001 saravindmaisale Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1750
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1834, PR1050558-1890, PR1050558-2035 h2. *Use same Autolaunched Orchestrator (no trigger) Approval Flow process*

extend and reuse flow built for [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|smart-link]

Step 3:
Flow on Contract : when status changes to submitted
NOTE: to choose/compare against client contract; query for executed contract where start date < today and end date > today or no end date.

# *Bonus*
If Clinician Contract’s bonus rate for the bonus type ( derived from CPA & Preventive care agreement) is not within the range of the bonus specified in bpats_Job__c object,( match by bonus type )
## submit for Approval
## Query ContractPaymentAgreement WHERE Type__c = Bonus WHERE ContractId = Id of the Contract when button was clicked (clinician contract)
## Get the service account team role, from clinician - HPF - SA.
### Query AccountTeamMember WHERE AccountId = Provider_Network_Contract__r.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId AND TeamMemberRole = “VP Operations” LIMIT 1
#### If Record Found Then Create a Approval Work Item and Approval Work Item Owner = User from Step 1.b.i
#### If No Record Found Raise an Error to the “For Approval of Bonus Request “VP Operations” role is required to be setup for Provider_Network_Contract__r.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.Name”
## If No Records Found Move to Next
# *Other Bonus*
## If there is value in Other bonus field, then send approval to VPO per HPF’s SA and Tactical Team Queue
# *Over Rate*
Background : If Client contract’s rate for the ( from HPF > SA > Contracts > CPA > PCA ) is lesser than Clinician Contract’s rate (from HPF > SA > Contracts > CPA > PCA ) (match based on facility title) then submit for Approval
## Query ContractPaymentAgreement WHERE Type__c = Stipend, Shift, Variable, Target WHERE ContractId = CurrentContractId and check if the rate is higher than the client contract’s rate.
## If Records Found
### Query AccountTeamMember WHERE AccountId = Provider_Network_Contract__r.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.AccountId AND TeamMemberRole = “VP Operations” LIMIT 1 - query the most recent record and use it.
### If Record Found Then submit for approval to VPO (role above)
### If No Record Found Raise an Error to the “For Approval of Bonus Request “VP Operations” role is required to be setup for Provider_Network_Contract__r.Healthcare_Practitioner_Facility__r.Name”
# If none of the criteria are met,
## update the current clinician contract status to approved. 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to a clinician record
And I have specified all necessary rates through the Contract Request experience
Then I can select *Submit Contract Request* on the Summary tab of the Contract record (only when Status = Draft)

And the following happens:

* If HPFs have *more than one Contracting Corporate Entity* (if Contract has more than one Contracting Corporate Entity) AND *Employment Type = Employee*
** Built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|smart-link]
* If there are *special terms*
** Built in [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-301|smart-link]
* If any *clinician rates do not match facility rates*
** Contract record updates to Status = Submitted
** Contract record is NOT locked from being edited
** Approval Types
*** *Bonus*: if there is a bonus specified outside the range of the job (fields on bpats__Jobc object are Commencement_Bonusc, Locums_Buyoutc, New_Grad_Bonusc, Relocation_Bonusc, Retention_Bonusc, Sign_On_Bonus__c)
**** Approval Work Item records are created for the following approvers per applicable HPF:
***** Account Team Role = VP Operations (with the ability to delegate)
****** when associated Service Accounts have different VPOs, only send approval to indicated facility on bonus request
****** if multiple VPOs, assign approval to the most recent VPO on the Account Team
****** NOTE: Since Bonus can ONLY be added to one HPF (look for the CPA related to the HPF), send approval to the VPO listed on the related Service Account. If there are more than 1 VPO listed on the Service Account, then assign to the most recently added VPO to the account team.
*** *Other Bonus*: in addition to routing above to VPO per applicable HPF, *Tactical Team Queue* must also approve in parallel
*** *Over Rate*: if clinician rates do not match facility rates
**** Approval Work Item record is created for the following approver based on the applicable HPF:
***** Account Team Role = VP Operations (with the ability to delegate)
****** when associated Service Accounts have different VPOs, only send approval to indicated facility for overrate
****** if a service account has multiple VPOs, assign approval to the most recent VPO on the Account Team
* If multiple steps are required, they occur in parallel and all are required
* If *none of the above criteria are met*
** Contract record updates to Status = Approved
* Approve/Reject Actions
** When users approve/reject they can add comments
** Send notification to request submitter and all approvers with comments
** Contract Status updated to Approved
** If Contract is not approved
*** Contract Status updated to Draft 		07/Oct/25 10:54 AM   8 image-20250909-080328.png 07/Aug/25 6:48 PM SCP Sprint 10 07/Aug/25 6:48 PM 1|i099yr:zzuzftwzwhr 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a Recruiter, I need to submit contracts for approval, so that I can ensure rates are aligned with SCP standards before sending out a term sheet 24/Sep/25

Clinician Agreement Approval Process: VPO

None
26/Sep/25
07/Oct/25 3:59 PM Unified Platform Phase 1 Release Done Client 360 Accepted   Critical ClientMaintenance, TADesignComplete Lisa Kleyla   PR1050558-3334, PR1050558-3330, PR1050558-1682, PR1050558-2906, PR1050558-2916, PR1050558-3187, PR1050558-3190, PR1050558-3017 tapas.dey Closed ClinicianClientExperience PR1050558-1739
No permission
 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-3075, PR1050558-3139, PR1050558-2699, PR1050558-2700, PR1050558-2868 Create a new button Change Request on Service Account record, that launches a omniscript.
Launches a screen
Do you want to make coverage changes? (radio button)
Yes
No

On Practice Operatiosn contract, create a new field (Type of Change) - Picklist - Options (Coverage, Others)
Yes maps to Coverage [Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = true]
No maps to Others. [Contract.Shift_Coverage_Change__c = false]

Based on Selection


MOCK (just a mock, refer to AC for requirements)

!image-20250925-213215.png|width=828,alt="image-20250925-213215.png"!

NOTE: removing the clone button on the Practice Operations contract is part of 3017 		0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project -Given I am a SFO-
-When I am on a Service Account record-
-Then I enter the Change Request guided experience-
-Then I must select which changes are applicable:-

* -Shift or Variable Rate Increase-
* -Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-
* -Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-
* -Coverage Change (note for new user story - if coverage change, create a task for Payroll queue to review before client contract is requested)-
* -Coverage Change with New Shift Type-
* -NP/PA Tier Change-

-And I am able to select one or more changes to proceed with-

-Then I must specify a Start Date (date, required) and Description (text, 1000, required) for these changes-

-Then the system clones the Service Account’s Practice Operations Contract in Status = “Executed” with the newly created contract in Status = Draft-

{color:#403294}*REVISED based on Solution/Design*{color}

{color:#403294}Given I am a SFO{color}
{color:#403294}When I am on a Service Account record{color}
{color:#403294}Then I enter the “Request Contract Change” guided experience (Service Account){color}
{color:#403294}Then I must select which change is applicable: (single select){color}

* {color:#403294}Shift Coverage Change {color}
** This option is used for:
*** {color:#403294}No new Shift Types{color}
*** {color:#403294}No new Rates{color}
*** {color:#403294}Allowed to add/remove Rate Pay Codes{color}
* {color:#403294}All Other Types of Change{color}
** This option is used for:
*** {color:#403294}Shift or Variable Rate Increase{color}
*** {color:#403294}Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change{color}
*** {color:#403294}Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change{color}
*** {color:#403294}Coverage Change with New Shift Type{color}
*** {color:#403294}NP/PA Tier Change{color}

{color:#403294}Then I must specify a Start Date (date, required) and Description (text, 1000, required) for these changes {color}

{color:#403294}-Then the system clones the Service Account’s Practice Operations Contract in Status = “Executed” with the newly created contract in Status = Draft-{color}{color:#403294} (Will cover rules on when to create in story {color}[+PR1050558-3017+|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-3017])

– Moved to Story: [https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2906|https://salesforce.atlassian.net/browse/PR1050558-2906|smart-link] –

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift or Variable Rate Increase-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing record with a higher number in the rate field or-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Shift/Variable Rate Reduction or Structure Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift rate records or create new Shift rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Stipend or Leadership Incentive Rate Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records or create new Stipend rate or Leadership Incentive rate records-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit existing Shift records, create new Shift records with the same type, and add rates for newly created shifts that match the same shift type-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-Coverage Change with New Shift Type-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to create new shifts where there is not already an existing shift of that type and I can add rates for the newly created shifts (also includes changes in Coverage Change detailed above)-

-Given I am a SFO in the Corporate Support Apps-
-When I select- *-NP/PA Tier Change-*
-Once the Contract has been cloned-
-Then I am only able to edit the NP/PA Tier field- 		07/Oct/25 3:59 PM   6 image-20250925-213215.png 07/Aug/25 12:58 PM SCP Sprint 10 10/Sep/25 5:31 AM 1|i0e69g:z 29/Jan/26 9:07 PM As a SFO, I want the ability to make Facility (Service Account) Contract changes to Rates and Coverages, so that changes can flow to downstream process such as Clinician contracting,Conga, Docusign, Qgenda, & Workday.

Facility Change Request: Rates & Coverage 1 of 2

None

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-2304, PR1050558-2360, PR1050558-2482 Create report on HPF, with the fields mentioned and filter on Status = Inactive and Termination Date = YESTERDAY. Group report by Service account and sorted by practitioner name.
Flow :
Object: HPF
Query for HPF where status = inactive. If there are atleast one record, then send email action, else do nothing.
Scheduled Flow : runs daily once.
Use custom metadata to store the emails, ( ; separated/ , separated) so its easier to use in the email list.
Get the account team members by the roles specified and their email address.
Send email action with link to the report.
Email template - to be provided [~accountid:712020:b8b82845-1665-49bb-bced-ce96d04329bd]


0 Jasmine Moradi 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Corporate Support team member
When a HPF record is updated so that Status = Inactive
Then I receive an email with a link to a Salesforce report

frequency = daily

recipients:

* [QGenda-Credentialing-DQ@scphealth.com|mailto:QGenda-Credentialing-DQ@scphealth.com] (this is a production email)
* [eeinactivations@scphealth.com|mailto:eeinactivations@scphealth.com] (this is a production email)
* [inactivations@scphealth.com|mailto:inactivations@scphealth.com] (this is a production email)
* Account Team Medical Staff Coordinator
* Account Team Clinician Experience Specialist
* Account Team Provider Coverage Coordinator
* Account Team Medical Staff Liaison CPA
* Account Team Recruiter Primary

report includes the following columns: Account, Practitioner, Termination Reason, Healthcare Practitioner Facility, Staffing Team (Account), Professional Title (Clinician), Facility Title (HPF), Last Date Worked (HPF), Company Signed Date (Contract), Hospital Privileged Date (HPF), First Scheduled Date (HPF), NPI (Clinician), Termination Date

report is grouped by Account (sort with alphabetical A at the top)
secondary sort by Practitioner Full Name

report is filtered by Termination Date = yesterday

Email Details:

* Subject: HPF Inactivation [yesterday’s date]
* Body:
Hello,
The following clinicians have been inactivated. Please navigate to the following report for additional details.
For any questions or concerns with the data listed, do not reply to this email.  Kristin Koide PR1050558-3084, PR1050558-3148, PR1050558-3247 Scheduled Flow on Assessment Envelope Record
Filter for Status = in progress, Today = CreatedDate + 3 ( 3 days since the intake form was assigned to the Clincian), and bpats__ATS_Applicant__c.ATS_stage = ' Awaiting intake form'
and Assessment record has not been created yet - if so send email.
// applicant is related to clinician via bpats__ATS_Applicant__c lookup to contact.
then send email action
If the assessment record is found, then don’t send email
Query the list of assessments assigned to the Clinician and display as a list (with link to the assessment record) in the email
Recruiter Name - Current User name,
Recruiter Title - Current user title
 0 Kristin Koide 5 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console app
When I update the ATS Stage field on an ATS Applicant record to Awaiting Intake Form
And Intake assessments have been assigned
And after 3 days, if the Clinician has any Intake assessments in Status = In Progress
Then automatically send an email notification to the Clinician containing the following information:

*Recipient*: Clinician’s Email

*Subject*: SCP Health | Tasks to Complete to Move Forward Together

*Body*:

Hi, [First Name if NP/PA/RN] or [Dr. [Last Name if MD/DO]:

 

Just a quick reminder that you have tasks to complete to continue moving forward in the recruitment process. This should only take a few minutes. You can view and complete your tasks by following this link:

 

[Click here to view your tasks - Preferred Option: list out all the different open assessments as a clickable link. Second Option: display a link to portal, so they can view their assessments on the the home tab. *Final Design*: *_we will display a read only list of open Assessment name(s) and at the bottom we will display a link to the portal, so users can navigate to the portal and complete their assessment(s)_*]

 

Thank you for taking the time to complete these steps – we’re excited to keep the process moving with you!

 

[Recruiter Name - use recruiter from the original intake case]

[Recruiter Title]

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-685, PR1050558-686, PR1050558-1595 * Create new Queue = Client Contracting Queue (supported Objects: Case)
* Create New Case Record Type = Client Contract Request
* See DD
** Add new fields to Case (Client Contract Request)
** Create new layout
* Security Matrix

!image-20250826-204406.png|width=1400,height=1857,alt="image-20250826-204406.png"! 		0 Kristin Koide 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project AC1: Negative path - Error message
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console apps
When I navigate to an *Opportunity* record (RT: Growth Oppty)
And Pro Forma Model Status ≠ Approved for Contracting
Then I click the “*Initiate Contracting Request*” button
And I am presented with an option to select Contract Type Request = *Client* *Agreement Request*
And an error message is displayed if I try to proceed: Pro Forma Model must be in Status = “Approved for Contracting” to submit a Client Agreement Request.
And I can exit out of the guided experience or click cancel to close the guided experience and to return to the Opportunity record

AC2: Positive path
Given I am a Sales VP in the Corporate Support or Corporate Support Console apps
When I navigate to an *Opportunity* record (RT: Growth Oppty)
And Pro Forma Model Status = Approved for Contracting
Then I have the ability to click the “*Initiate Contracting Request*” button
And I am presented with an option to select Contract Type Request = *Client* *Agreement Request*

Then I am presented with an Update Key Information screen to capture (*all questions are required; unless otherwise specified*):

* General Information (section header, expanded by default)
** Request Type (picklist, values below)
*** Initial Request, Revised Request
** Contract Type (multi-select)
*** Outsourced, Performance Edge, Other (Provide Description Below)
If Other is selected, provide a (free text, 50 characters) comment box title 'Service Type Other Description”
*** if Performance Edge is selected, display the following field:
**** Select Package (picklist, values below)
***** Package 1, Package 2, Package 3
** Expected Start Date (date)
** Initial Term (Years) (number, 2 digits 0 decimals)
** Standard 1-Year Auto-Renewal (checkbox, default unchecked)
* Services (section header, expanded by default)
** Service Type (multi-select picklist)
*** EM
*** HM
*** Critical Care
*** Other
**** If “Other” is selected, display the following field:
***** Service Type - Other (free text, 50 characters)
** Connected Care Services Included (checkbox, default unchecked)
** EM Tele-triage Services (checkbox, default unchecked)
** HM Telemedicine Services (checkbox, default unchecked)
* Financial Information (section header, expanded by default)
** Financial Arrangement (picklist, values below)
*** Fee for Service with No Subsidy, Fee for Service & Flat Subsidy, Margin Guarantee, Fixed Management Fee, Other
*** if Other is selected, display the following field:
**** Provide description (free text, 50 characters)
** Annual Subsidy - if applicable (NOT REQUIRED free text, 50 characters)
** If there are multiple programs, is there any cross subsidization? (picklist, values below)
*** Yes, No, N/A
** Volume Protector (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If yes on Volume Protector, show another checkbox titled ‘If Yes, are terms reflected in the Proforma?’
** Material Change Language (checkbox, default unchecked)
** Start-up Costs (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If checked, display the following fields:
**** ‘If Yes, for how long?’ (free text, 50)
**** ‘Maximum Amount Hospital will Contribute?’ (free text, 50)
** Current Clinicians under Non-Compete? (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If yes, show field: ‘If yes, what is SCP’s contribution?' (free text, 50)
** Governance Provisions (picklist, values below)
*** Quarterly Governance Meetings (full transparency, standard process) + Regular Operating Reviews, Quarterly Business Reviews + Regular Operating Reviews, Routine Operating Reviews Only
** Leased Providers (checkbox, default unchecked)
** Other Leased Personnel (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If checked, display the following field:
**** Other Leased Personnel Description (free text, 255 characters)
* Insurance (section header, expanded by default)
** Malpractice Insurance Provided By (picklist, values below)
*** Client, SCP Health
** Standard Malpractice Limits (checkbox, default Checked -unchecked-)
*** If no, provide text box ‘If non-standard, provide details below’ (text, 255)
* KPI / Incentive at Risk (section header, expanded by default)
** Performance/Quality Metrics (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If checked, show field picklist ‘Performance Quality Metrics Select One’ (Agreed Upon, To be Negotiated prior to Start Date)
**** If Agreed Upon, show text box ‘If agreed upon, please -attach or- provide details -below-’ (free text, 255)
** KPI At Risk Money (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If yes, show text box ‘If Yes, amount at risk: $ or % (At risk money may not exceed amount of Subsidy)’ (text, 50)
** KPI Incentive Money (checkbox, default unchecked)
*** If yes, show text box ‘If Yes, amount of Incentive Money: $ or %’ (text, 50)
* Other Information (section header, expanded by default)
** GME Program (checkbox, default unchecked)
** Additional Comments (NOT REQUIRED, free text, 500 characters)

And upon selecting button = “Finish”

* The system shall update the appropriate records as specified in the solution
** Case record with *Record Type = Client Agreement Request,* with values inputted by the Sales VP
*** Case Owner =Client Contracting Queue
*** Subject = Client Agreement Request for <Account Name from Opportunity record>
*** Type = Client Agreement
*** Status = Not Started
*** Origin = Manual
*** Priority = Medium
*** *Display* a link to the Contracting Pro Forma Model record (Pro Forma Model in Status = “Approved for Contracting” from Opportunity)
*** Link to *Opportunity* record where the case was initiated from
** Experience is closed automatically and I am navigated back to the Opportunity record

And if the user selects button = “Cancel”

* No Case record is created
* Experience is closed automatically and I am navigated back to the Opportunity record



NOTE: SF text fields are at 64 char, not 50 		25/Sep/25 11:06 AM   6 Screenshot 2025-09-17 at 7.06.26 PM.png 23/Jun/25 8:47 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 24/Jun/25 3:47 PM 1|i08c0x:tzzzzzzzx 29/Jan/26 9:09 PM As a Sales VP, I need to request agreements for my clients, so that we can generate a contract with necessary information for SCP to provide services 11/Sep/25

 Jasmine Moradi PR1050558-1518, PR1050558-1517, PR1050558-2516 Create a guided screen flow / omniscript with multiple screens. Create a
one screen per section mentioned above
Create screen fields of the type mentioned on the AC. They get mapped to the - to be created new fields on ATS Applicant object. (To be added to DD, but they can be created from the AC)
After the final section, on next -
If you already have the ContactId, use that. else query for contact using email/full name fields.

check the associated user record to check the user type field if its Portal user. If so, display the message
//SELECT Id FROM User WHERE ContactId = :yourContactId AND Profile.Name = 'Customer Portal User'

“The screen is complete. [Full Name] has already been added to the Prospect Portal. Please remind them to login to check their application status.”


else display “The screen is complete. [Full Name] has not yet been added to the Prospect Portal. Please let them know that they will receive a login link and can use the portal to check the status of their application throughout the process.”

For number field validation message, “Must be [number] digits without decimals” 		0 Jasmine Moradi 8 Restricted to agents Restricted to agents 0 Story SCP Health - All In Proservices Digital Transformation-Project Given I am a Recruiter in the Corporate Support apps
When I navigate to an ATS Applicant record
Then I can select Screening Call in the header
And a guided experience opens where I can edit/populate the following fields:

* Interest
** Requested Start Date (ATS Applicant - date)
** Requested Hours Per Month (ATS Applicant -number 3,0)
** Shift Preferences (ATS Applicant - text, 250)
** Best Time to Contact (ATS Applicant - text, 250)
** Ties to Location (ATS Applicant - text 250)
** Personal Interests/Hobbies (ATS Applicant - text 250)
** _Note: the fields described above need to be created on the ATS Applicant object. Create a new section labeled “Screening Call - Interest” and place it below Applicant Details_
* Applicant
** Professional Title (Contact.Professional_Title__c)
*** NP Type (Contact - NP Type - picklist) field displays if Professional Title = NP, picklist values below
**** Acute Care Nurse Practitioner, Adult-Gerontology Acute Care Nurse Practitioner, Emergency Nurse Practitioner, Family Nurse Practitioner
** Primary Specialty (HealthcareProviderSpecialty record where Primary_Board_Specialty__c = TRUE)
** Practicing Specialty (HealthcareProviderSpecialty record where Primary_Board_Specialty__c = FALSE)
** Additional Specialties (HealthcareProviderSpecialty record where Primary_Board_Specialty__c = FALSE)
** Professional Status (Contact.Professional_Status__c)
*** Program and End Date fields display if Professional Status = Resident
** Board Certification Status (BoardCertification record display Status field)
** Sponsorship Need? (Contact.Sponsorship_Need__c)
*** Visa Type field displays if Sponsorship Need? = Yes (Contact.Visa_Type__c)
* Qualification
** Years of Experience in Desired Role (ATS Applicant - number 2,0)
** Years of Leadership Experience (ATS Applicant - number 2,0)
** Willing to do procedures? (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
*** Help text: Required for HM
** Willing to do ventilator management? (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
*** Help text: Required for HM
** ACLS certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** ATLS certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** BLS certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** PALS certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** NALS certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** NRP certification (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** Medical Licenses (BusinessLicense records - display as state multi-select picklist)
** IMLC License (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** DEA Licenses (ATS Applicant - checkbox - default unchecked)
** Electronic Health Record System Proficiencies (ATS Applicant - free text, 250)
** Pre-Screen Queries Clear? (ATS Applicant - picklist - values: Yes, No)
*** Pre-Screen Additional Details field displays if Pre-Screen Queries Clear = No (ATS Applicant - free text, 250)
** Current CV? (ATS Applicant - picklist - values: Yes, No)
** Potential credentialling delay? (ATS Applicant - picklist - values: Yes, No)
*** Help text: Is there anything in the clinician’s background that may cause a delay in credentialing?
*** Credentialling Additional Details field displays if Potential credentialling delay? = Yes (ATS Applicant - free text, 250)
** MD/DO clinician agree to supervisory physician role? (ATS Applicant - picklist - values: Yes, No)
*** Help text: If the clinician is an MD/DO and the facility has NP/PA coverage, has the clinician been informed of their primary or alternate supervisory physician role for nurse practitioners and physician assistants, and do they agree to work in this capacity?
** Comments (ATS Applicant.Comments__c)
** _Note: the fields described above need to be created on the ATS Applicant object if an API name was not specified. Create a new section labeled “Screening Call - Qualification” and place it below the newly created Screening Call - Interest section_

Then when I navigate to the next screen, I am able to see a confirmation:

* Check if the provider has already been provisioned for experience cloud
** If Yes, display the following message “The screen is complete. [Full Name] has already been added to the Prospect Portal. Please remind them to login to check their application status.”
** If No, display the following message “The screen is complete. [Full Name] has not yet been added to the Prospect Portal. Please let them know that they will receive a login link and can use the portal to check the status of their application throughout the process.” 		25/Sep/25 4:08 PM   5 27/May/25 12:43 PM SCP Sprint 10, SCP Sprint 9 24/Jul/25 4:08 PM 1|i08c0x:tzzzzr 29/Jan/26 9:10 PM As a Recruiter, I need to use a guided wizard for my screening calls with prospects, so that I can quickly update prospect data and have prompts for items to cover on the call 10/Sep/25
